The Fortune Cookie In their very first screen pairing, Walter Matthau (who would win a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his performance) and Jack Lemmon portray a crooked lawyer and his TV cameraman brother-in-law in this madcap tale of greed and recouping lost love.
The Private Life Of Sherlock Holmes When a beautiful woman claims that her husband has disappeared, the investigation takes Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson to Scotland, where they uncover a plot involving a clandestine society, Her Majesty's Secret Service... and the Loch Ness Monster!
Sabrina (1954) Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.
We Were Soldiers In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.
Flight of the Intruder The target: a missile depot in Hanoi. The plane: the A-6 Intruder, a low-altitude bomber with no defensive weapons. The risk: court-martial at the hands of Commander Camparelli...if they live to return.
Saving Private Ryan A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.
Jeepers Creepers After making a horrific discovery in the basement of a old church, Trish and her brother Darry watch their routine road trip home turn into a heart stopping race for their lives. They are now the chosen prey of a force that relentlessly pursues them.
Jeepers Creepers 2 The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.
Stigmata A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.
The Manchurian Candidate As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.
Gemini Man Will Smith stars in the nonstop action thrill-ride from Academy Award®-winning director Ang Lee. Retired hitman (Smith) is forced on the run and finds himself hunted by his ultimate adversary - a younger clone of himself.
Get Rich or Die Tryin' Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.
The Foreigner Quan is a humble London businessman whose long-buried past erupts in a revenge-fueled vendetta when the only person left for him to love -- his teenage daughter -- dies in a senseless act of politically motivated terrorism.
Tekken The year is 2039. The world wars have destroyed everything, and territories are run by corporations, the mightiest of which is TEKKEN. In the midst of the ruined society, one warrior rises from the streets.
7 Assassins When gold goes missing in ancient China, royal guards entrusted with its recovery realize they are not the only people in pursuit.
Men in Black³ Agent Jay travels back in time to 1969, where he teams up with a younger version of Agent Kay to stop an evil alien from destroying the future.
The Longest Yard (2005) The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.
Here Comes the Boom A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches to raise money to save the school's music program.
Vanilla Sky Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.
Dreamland Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.
The Mexican A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.
Disturbia Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.
John Grisham's The Rainmaker Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.
Along Came A Spider After the harrowing death of his partner, detective and best-selling author Alex Cross has retreated to the peace of retirement. But when a brilliant criminal (Michael Wincott) kidnaps a senator’s young daughter, Alex is lured back into action.
The Wolf of Wall Street Sex. Money. Power. Drugs. Brace yourself for a true story from legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough.
An Unfinished Life Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.
Flags of Our Fathers From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.
Return Of The Seven Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!
The Shootist Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.
Blazing Saddles Ribald, tasteless and hilarious ... this classic spoof of the Western genre by director Mel Brooks pokes fun at everyone and everything.
Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen The battle for Earth continues when college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers and must join in their continued battle against the Decepticons.
Transformers: Dark of the Moon A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.
Transformers From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.
RV (2006) A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.
Snack Shack In Nebraska City, 1991, two best friends get the chance to run the swimming pool snack shack, which later becomes the perfect setting for transgression, fun, personal discovery, and romance.
The Guilt Trip "Barbra Streisand and Seth Rogen are the perfect comedy duo"* as they embark on one mother of a road trip! When Andy invites his mom on an 8-day, 3,000-mile journey across the country, the farther they go, the closer they get. *Jake Hamilton, FOX-TV
Super Rainn Wilson, Elliot Page, Liv Tyler, and Kevin Bacon bring to life this super-entertaining action fantasy about a regular joe turned homegrown masked avenger.
Knights of Badassdom Live-action role players conjure up a demon from Hell by mistake and they must deal with the consequences.
I Think We're Alone Now The carefully crafted paradise of the last man on Earth is threatened by the arrival of a mysterious interloper.
Prey (2007) While on holiday, an Amerian family are trapped by hungry lions in South Africa.
Let Me In Owen, an overlooked and bullied boy, finds love and revenge through Abby (Chloë Grace Moretz of KICK-ASS), a beautiful but peculiar girl who turns out to be a vampire.
Hell House LLC. Five years after an unexplained malfunction causes the death of 15 tour-goers and staff on the opening night of a Halloween haunted house tour, a documentary crew travels back to the scene of the tragedy to find out what really happened.
Purple Rain Rock star Prince makes a spectacular feature film debut in this highly autobiographical blockbuster that won both an Oscar and a Grammy award.
Footloose A rebellious city boy finds himself in an uptight Midwestern town where dancing and therefore all youthful joy has been banned.
Terms of Endearment Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.
Wayne's World 2 Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?
Evolution A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.
Daddy's Home Will Ferrell & Mark Wahlberg face off in this Dad vs Step-Dad showdown! Brad (Ferrell) wants to be the best step-dad to his new wife's kids. But when their actual father Dusty (Wahlberg) shows up, the two must go toe-to-toe in this fun family comedy.
Revolver REVOLVER is populated with Guy Ritchie's (Snatch; Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels) classic breed of fast-talking, sharp-suited gangsters but with a psychological twist that your mind may not be able to handle.
Better Luck Tomorrow To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.
Witness When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.
Nacho Libre Jack Black is more hilarious than ever as Ignacio, a monastery cook who feeds orphan children by day and by night transforms himself into Nacho Libre, a notorious Luchador in stretchy pants.
Coneheads One look, and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of France, by way of far-off, far-out Remulak. They're Coneheads.
In & Out A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.
Harriet the Spy Harriet M. Welsch is probably the world’s most accomplished 11-year-old spy. Harriet dreams of being a writer, and her nanny and best friend, Golly, told her to start by writing down everything she sees.
South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman sneak into an R-rated movie that warps their fragile minds. Soon their parents declare war on Canada and the guys are America's last hope to stop Armageddon.
Wayne's World When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.
Brannigan John Wayne stars as Chicago Police Lieutenant Jim Brannigan and Richard Attenborough co-stars as British policeman Cmdr. Swann in this action-comedy. Brannigan teams up in the U.K. with Cmdr Swann to escort a crime boss back to the U.S.
Chato's Land Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.
North Dallas Forty In a society in which major league sporting events have replaced Sunday worship as the religion of choice, North Dallas Forty appears like a desecration at the altar.
Terminator Genisys When John Connor sends Kyle Reese back to 1984 to protect a young Sarah Connor, unexpected events alter the past and threaten the future for all mankind. Charged with a new mission, Reese must join forces with Sarah and her "Guardian" to save the world.
The 6th Day In the very near future, cattle, fish, and even the family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal - that is, until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Rating: PG-13
Total Recall It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.
Old School Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.
Eurotrip Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!
Catch Me If You Can From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!
The New Adventures of Old Christine Christine's attraction to Ritchie's teacher, Mr. Harris, causes a scene at a school fundraiser—especially after Ritchie wins a playdate with him and is unable to go.
Rules of Engagement Audrey considers quitting her job when she realizes it's making her life miserable. Although things are heated between Allison and Timmy, she wants to put their sex life aside so they can spend time getting to know each other.
Rules of Engagement Audrey embarks on a new start after quitting her demanding job; however, her time at home makes her stir crazy, prompting her to start a cookie business. Timmy is getting advice from the guys who encourage him to be more of a dude than a gentleman.
Rules of Engagement Stuck with a store Jeff leased for Audrey's fleeting cookie shop, he and Adam stay behind to clean up and discover a new game using the heads of mannequins.
Rules of Engagement Jeff and Audrey embark on finding a surrogate mother, only to run into problems with the interviewing process. Russell's wealthy mother comes to town, and he reluctantly decides to have her stop paying his rent.
The Conners Dan meets his in-laws for the first time when Louise's family comes to visit; Darlene helps Becky with a parenting problem.
The Conners The death of a beloved teacher from Dan and Jackie's high school brings old classmates together; Becky asks Darlene and Ben for a big favour.
The Conners Darlene and Ben get into a fight and ignore Becky's boundaries in the house; Dan accuses Jackie of losing all of their home videos.
The Conners Darlene has issues with Dan's plumbing work in her new house; Jackie tries to find a caregiver for Bev.
Marauders FBI agents (Christopher Meloni, Dave Bautista) uncover a conspiracy while trying to nail a group of deadly bank robbers.
Crypto A Wall Street banker connects a small-town art gallery to a global conspiracy, putting his own family in grave danger.
King of Thieves When a vindictive bandit threatens the peace of a flourishing kingdom, the native mystical and worldly forces must come together to save the day.
Doubt A mesmerizing, suspense-filled drama elevated by four riveting Oscar-nominated performances from Meryl Streep, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Amy Adams, and Viola Davis, DOUBT will have you pinned to the edge of your seat.
Chicago Winner of 6 Academy Awards, including Best Picture, and based on the hit Broadway musical, Chicago is a dazzling spectacle cheered by audiences and critics alike, where crimes of passion make way for legends to those seeking the spotlight.
Bridget Jones's Diary Single girl Bridget Jones decides to turn over a new page in her life, channeling her thoughts, opinions, and insecurities into a diary. It's instead a hilarious chronicle of her adventures in this modern-romance classic based on the bestseller.
The Ladies Man (2000) Leon loses his radio show because of his X-rated on-air comments. He then gets a letter from a former flame promising him a lifetime of wealth and happiness, and things start looking up!
Boomerang Advertising executive Marcus Graham is a quintessential bachelor, Graham is never without a new lady on his arm. Enter Jacqueline, his new boss, and Marcus is on the receiving end of his own patented behavior for the first time!
Top Five Written, directed and starring Chris Rock, TOP FIVE tells the story of New York City comedian-turned-film star Andre Allen, whose unexpected encounter with a journalist forces him to confront the comedy career—and the past—that he’s left behind.
Top Gun: Maverick Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.
Jack Reacher Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody, who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!"
Shooter Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.
Scary Movie The spoof that started it all. Scream with the Wayans brothers, Carmen Electra, Shannon Elizabeth, and Anna Faris as they bumble and shriek their way to horror-movie hilarity in Scary Movie.
Scary Movie 2 Four teens are tricked by their professor into visiting a haunted house for a school project.
Scary Movie 3 David Zucker (AIRPLANE!) directs SCARY MOVIE 3, which piles on hysterical, yet gratuitous, cameos with thrillers, blockbusters, and pop-culture in general getting their best goosing yet.
Mission: Impossible Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.
Mission: Impossible II The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.
Mission: Impossible III Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.
Cheers Diane finds a coat and believes the mysterious owner is the man of her dreams.
Cheers Carla's 16-year-old wants to marry his high school sweetheart.
Cheers Diane is convinced the crazed actor from her past is out to get her.
Cheers Sam tries to cover up the truth when he loses Diane's priceless book.
Cheers The guys of Cheers try to lift Carla's spirits when she places a personal ad.
Cheers Norm hires a private investigator to find out if Vera is having an affair.
Cheers The Cheers gang challenges a rival bar to a bowling tournament.
Cheers Cliff learns his estranged father is leading a secret life.
Cheers Diane uses Sam as a case study for a paper in her Human Sexuality class, but she paints an unflattering picture of him. Meanwhile, Woody challenges Carla to a sports trivia contest, and Cliff grows a unique squash.
MST3K: The Time Travelers A botched experiment hurls a group of scientists into a bleak future full of mutants, androids and catty humans in this 1964 sci-fi romp.
MST3K: Yongary, Monster From The Deep Rockets, earthquakes and reptiles, oh may. Jonah and the bots dive into a South Korean monster film that's long on rampages ad short on sensible behavior.
Mystery Science Theater 3000: Attack of the Giant Leeches Hillbillies, holo-clowns, and a giant leech named Patches abound when Joel and the Bots take on this bloodsucking tale from acclaimed producer/director Roger Corman.
FailFactory Spoiler alert: nature wins.
FailArmy Now What bad decisions, pants and New Year have in common.
FailArmy Now What fish, lakes and tech have in common.
FailArmy Now What pets, games and bridesmaids have in common.
FailArmy Now What logs, rains and karma have in common.
FailArmy Now What dogs, laziness and hobbies have in common.
FailArmy Now Doors, families and annoyance.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for December '24.
Freaks and Geeks Sam discovers that having a dream come true may not be such a good thing; Ken's new relationship is threatened by a disturbing piece of information about his girlfriend.
Daria A strange series of coincidences convinces Quinn that she has a guardian angel looking out for her, and Brittany's parents throw a party to celebrate her grades.
Daria When a kitchen fire does damage to the Morgendorffer home, the family goes to an expensive hotel while Daria stays with Jane and Trent at their house.
Daria Tensions between Jane and Daria come to a head when Daria realizes that her feelings for Tom might be more complex than she'd ever expected.
Daria After Lawndale High gets roped into a marketing scheme as a result of school budget cuts, Ms. Li gets in over her head, and Daria takes a stand.
Daria Daria questions her relationship with Tom as their six-month anniversary approaches, and Jake pursues a new career with an internet start-up.
Daria The leadership of the Fashion Club faces a shake-up, Daria and Jane make friendly wagers on their classmates and teachers, and Quinn helps Sandi get into shape.
Workaholics After a special adult video the guys order goes missing, they must embark on a quest to find the package before it's too late.
RiffTrax: Fangs Of The Living Dead Ease into your most practical dungeon-exploring negligee and join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Fangs of the Living Dead! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.
RiffTrax: City Of The Dead Join the former stars of MST3K on their visit to scenic City of the Dead!. Comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (former stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 aka MST3K).
RiffTrax: Hillbillys in a Haunted House RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60's non-scary horror classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill.
Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.
The Exes Holly volunteers to help Stuart impress his ex at a ballroom dance competition, but Holly's "talent" hurts more than it helps. Phil meets his match in a woman who beats him at his own game
Everybody Hates Chris When Chris discovers that his long-standing crush, Tasha, likes 'bad boys,' he decides it's time to lose his 'nice guy' image and win over the girl of his dreams.
Everybody Hates Chris When Chris' entire family comes down with the flu, Rochelle and Julius make arrangements for Mr. Omar to look after Chris until the family recovers.
Everybody Hates Chris With Greg's father out of town, Chris invites Greg to stay at his house for the week.
Everybody Hates Chris When a new student, Albert, enrolls at Corleone, Chris realizes that he has a lot more in common with Albert than just being the only two African American kids in school.
Hot in Cleveland After finding a smooth minister to marry her to Fred, Elka becomes a high-maintenance bride, and Victoria tests a perspiration absorbing jumpsuit.
Hot in Cleveland On the day of Elka and Fred's wedding, Melanie, Victoria, and Joy wake up surrounded by passed-out frat boys, then piece together what happened the night before.
Hot in Cleveland After her presumed-dead husband comes back into her life, Elka runs away with him, as Victoria exploits her bogus same-sex marriage to Joy for publicity.
Hot in Cleveland On a gay cruise, Victoria and Joy continue the charade that they are married, while Melanie runs into her sister and her girlfriend.
Beavis and Butt-Head Episode 6 includes The Pipe of Doom, Safe Driving, Liar! Liar!, and Generation in Crisis, handpicked by Mike Judge himself.
Beavis and Butt-Head Episode 7 includes Beavis and Butt-Head Vs. the Vending Machine, Radio Sweethearts, The Great Cornholio, and Held Back, handpicked by Mike Judge himself.
Beavis and Butt-Head Episode 8 includes Choke, Killing Time, Safe House, and Dude, A Reward, handpicked by Mike Judge himself.
Nathan For You Nathan tries to leverage Best Buy's price-matching policy by advertising a deal on TVs that's too good to be true.
Nathan For You Nathan devises a way to provide a moving company with free labor.
Nathan For You Nathan recruits child athletes for endorsement deals and finds a way to put drunk people's clumsiness to good use.
Nathan For You Nathan works with the owner of a bar to turn her business into an immersive theater experience.
RENO 911! Dangle gets a new job in Carson City, but the deputies are too wrapped up in women's basketball to give him a proper send-off.
RENO 911! When the lieutenant governor's brother goes missing, the FBI swings in to help the deputies.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon and Adrien Broner battle it out in games: So Fly, Plead The Fifth, Remix, and the Wildstyle. Performance by Yo Gotti featuring Rich Homie Quan
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Big Tigger, and RiceGum battle it out in games: Pick Up and Kill It, Got Damned, Hood Jeopardy and the Wildstyle battle. Rico Nasty performs.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Naomi, Jimmy, and Jey battle it out in games: Flow Job, Diss Side Dat Side, Bullspittin' and the Wildstyle battle. Rich The Kid performs, No Cap.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon and a celebrity guest will lead two teams of improv regulars in an all-out comedy battle before a live audience.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, and Sidney Starr battle it out in games: Alphabet Train, Plead The Fifth, Kick 'Em Out The Classroom, and the Wildstyle battle. Bobb'e J Thompson performs Pressure.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Naughty By Nature and Pivot Gang battle it out in games: Pick Up And Kill It, Let Me Holla, Hip Hop History and the Wildstyle battle. Pivot Gang performs.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Swizz Beatz and Kash Doll battle it out in games: Pick Up And Kill It, Turn Me Up In The Headphones, Remix and the Wildstyle battle. Swizz Beatz performs.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Katt Williams, Mark Curry and Michael Blackson battle it out in games: Got Damned, On the Gang, Plead the Fifth, Wildstyle battle. Justina Valentine performs Mouth Go Crazy.
The Addams Family When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.
The Addams Family Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.
The Addams Family Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.
The Addams Family Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.
The Addams Family Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.
The Addams Family Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.
The Addams Family Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.
The Addams Family Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.
The Addams Family Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.
Tosh.0 The Naked Wizard gets a Web Redemption, Daniel hires a pleasure coach, and women compete in a slam dunk contest.
Tosh.0 Two players collide during a game of kayak polo, a YouTube sensation sings one of his hits, and Daniel tries to break the record for the world's fastest dinner date.
Tosh.0 A Lifetime special takes a hard look at food fighting, a drummer with a weak stomach gets a Web Redemption, and Daniel unloads on the New England Patriots.
Tosh.0 Daniel redeems the proudest American, finds out what really goes on inside a girls' locker room and plays an international game of Ping-Pong.
Tosh.0 Daniel fuels paranoia about staying in hotels and a woman who was fired for being too hot gets a Web Redemption.
Tosh.0 Asians impersonate Christopher Walken, Chris Crocker gets a Web Redemption, and Andy Dick auditions for "Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian."
Tosh.0 The Afro Ninja gets a Web Redemption, Daniel learns how croutons are made, and porn star Bree Olson plays beer pong with Dave Attell.
Tosh.0 As the third season of Tosh.0 wraps up, the block party of the century gets a Video Breakdown, and Daniel auditions to host the Oscars.
Tosh.0 A camel gives birth, a high school football fan goes pro, and Daniel comes up with exciting new uses for a leaf blower.
Three's Company Jack subs for the chef at Angelino's restaurant, where a mobster is so impressed with the bill of fare that he insists Jack be made permanent chef.
Three's Company Jack adopts a new image and changes his career plans to please an affluent woman who'd like to marry him.
Three's Company Jack pretends he's a doctor to impress his visiting grandfather, who's eager to observe Jack's hospital practice.
Three's Company Jack challenges a famous food critic to sample his cuisine, aiming for a favorable review in his newspaper column.
Three's Company Terri lines up a fancy new house for the trio to move into but Larry and Mr. Furley, not wanting to see their best friends leave, plot to make them feel wanted enough to stay.
Three's Company Jack becomes a hit with TV viewers when he botches a cooking demonstration promoting Angelino's restaurant.
Three's Company Janet buys a blonde wig and is so taken with her new image that she alienates her roommates, Furley, and a new neighbor as well.
Three's Company Jack agrees to be Janet's date at a stuffy, formal party. After taking an invigorating drink, he becomes the life of the party, embarrassing Janet and causing a shambles. Guest Star(s): Barry Williams
Three's Company After a happily-married computer-matched couple sells Jack on the merits of computer dating, the fun begins when Jack secretly signs up.
The Dick Van Dyke Show Rob and Buddy find themselves overworked when Sally becomes a television personality overnight.
The Dick Van Dyke Show When Laura fills in for Sally at the office, her performance exceeds everyone's expectations.
Petticoat Junction Dr. Craig mobilizes an effort to inoculate the whole valley with flu shots, but a hillbilly family with a stubborn patriarch threatens to ruin her plans.
Petticoat Junction Bickering over sharing a bathroom with Uncle Joe leads to Steve & Betty Jo considering moving out. They haven't much luck with Mr. Haney's realty choices, and Haney isn't much help either in helping Joe install a new bathroom at the hotel.
Petticoat Junction Bobby Jo's boyfriend Orrin finally manages to make friends with Uncle Joe when he rescues the old fellow from a hungry bear.
Petticoat Junction Baby Kathy Jo almost misses her ffirst birthday party when she lands in jail with Uncle Joe.
Petticoat Junction Uncle Joe tries to get rid of the pet chimp who is gradually wrecking the Shady Rest hotel.
Petticoat Junction Uncle Joe discovers that the 75th anniversary of the railroad between Hooterville & Pixley is approaching, and seeks to take control of the ceremony.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him. The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum.
Family Ties Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.
Family Ties Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.
Family Ties When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.
Family Ties While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.
Family Ties Steven and Elyse worry that Jennifer's softball team coach is pushing the girls too hard.
Family Ties A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.
Family Ties Alex anxiously awaits a crucial college recommendation from his English teacher.
Family Ties On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.
Family Ties Alex is both amazed and furious when a critical admissions interview at Princeton University is shattered by his hysterical sister Mallory.
Mork & Mindy After ruining Fred and Mindy's night, Mork decides he wants to go back to Ork, so Orson shows him what the McConnells' lives would have been like if Mork had never arrived on Earth.
Mork & Mindy Mork becomes so hopelessly addicted to advertisements that they invade his dreams.
Mork & Mindy Mork decides to become a priest.
Mork & Mindy Mork foolishly picks a fight with Mindy in order to "kiss and make up."
Mork & Mindy Mork and Mindy compete to earn a job working for Nelson.
Happy Days Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.
Happy Days Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.
Happy Days Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.
Happy Days Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.
The Love Boat A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.
The Love Boat Captain Stubing hires a handsome new photographer who draws the attention of two sisters who were visiting Doc and Gopher. Then, a young man is shocked to meet his mother's (Lee Meriwether) new boyfriend, who is the same age as him.
The Love Boat An inventor's zealousness jeopardizes his chance for romance and a man's double identity upsets Julie and a passenger.
The Love Boat A boy who thinks his grandmother (Glynis Johns) is terminally ill will do anything to ensure her happiness; a man (Ed Begley Jr.) who's uncomfortable around women falls in love with a mermaid (Mary Crosby).
The Love Boat Bonnie Franklin appears as Capt. Stubing's infuriatingly sarcastic ex-wife with her present spouse, the captain's boss.
The Beverly Hillbillies Jed, Granny, Elly May, and Jethro man the front lines against an expected invasion of grunion, which they believe to be hostile aliens.
The Beverly Hillbillies The hillbillies, encouraged by Mr. Drysdale, continue to guard the Malibu beach and repel the mythical Grunion invaders.
The Beverly Hillbillies Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.
The Beverly Hillbillies Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.
The Beverly Hillbillies The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.
The Beverly Hillbillies The hillbilly women, assured of their equal rights, return to the Clampett mansion.
The Beverly Hillbillies Elly May gets a job at Mr. Drysdale's bank and moves into co-worker Jane Hathaway's apartment.
The Beverly Hillbillies Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.
The Beverly Hillbillies Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.
The Andy Griffith Show Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.
The Andy Griffith Show A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.
The Andy Griffith Show Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.
The Andy Griffith Show Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.
The Andy Griffith Show Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.
The Andy Griffith Show Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.
The Andy Griffith Show Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.
The Andy Griffith Show Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.
The Andy Griffith Show Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.
227 After Mary takes the lead in a low-budget horror film, the former star vents his anger by attempting to cause her demise.
227 While excitedly preparing for Brenda's high school graduation, Mary is stricken with appendicitis and ends up sharing a hospital room with a woman who has had extensive plastic surgery.
227 Mary may be faced with eviction when 227's stingy landlord dies, and her nemesis Sandra is in line to inherit the building.
227 When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and 'man-wise' neighbor.
Malcolm & Eddie Felling as though Malcolm is taking advantage of their friendship at work, Nicolette quits.
Malcolm & Eddie The Fifty-Fifty Club's future is in doubt when Malcolm falls for the landlord's daughter.
Malcolm & Eddie Nicolette wants to have a baby and for Malcolm to be the father.
Malcolm & Eddie Eddie takes Malcolm to the 'Citizen's Court' following the theft of some prized hats.
Malcolm & Eddie While her apartment is being painted, Nicolette moves in with Malcolm and Eddie.
The Brady Bunch Cindy loses her mom's earrings after playing with them, and "detective" Peter Brady tries to solve the mystery. But when Carol wants the earrings for a costume ball and they're still not found, the entire family tries to crack the case.
All in the Family A bathroom fire drives the Bunkers from the house in the middle of the night. Later Archie expects a handsome insurance check.
All in the Family Mike and Gloria have an argument after a Scrabble game about Mike always being right and that she never did get to go to college as Mike had promised. Mike also ends up with Archie as a roommate for one night.
All in the Family To change the public perception of their lodge Archie proposes that they let in a black Jewish fellow from his work.
All in the Family The day has come that Mike and Gloria are moving into their new home and Archie is practically pushing them out the door. Archie is being so obnoxious that Mike finally reaches a boiling point until he declares his independence and calls Archie a fathead.
All in the Family Archie will do anything to get a promotion at the loading dock. So, he agrees to help Mr. Sanders with his latest charity, unaware that it involves something that goes against his morals - organ donation.
All in the Family While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.
All in the Family Mike - along with everyone else - debate where he should be when Gloria is in the delivery room giving birth to their baby.
All in the Family Archie rips up a chain letter, thinking it to be nothing more than baloney. Then a whole bunch of accidents happen. Coincidence or did Archie really set off the string of mishaps?
Newsradio Jimmy arranges for Matthew and Joe to compete in an Ultimate Fighting match; Bill tries to intervene when Jimmy's nephew asks Lisa for a date.
Man With A Plan Adam is thrilled and honored to help Joe buy a new car but is caught off guard when Joe suddenly becomes irritable, and the negotiations go off track.
Man With A Plan When Adam and Don realize they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company.
Man With A Plan Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she'll then be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall.
Man With A Plan Andi proposes an exciting idea for Adam and her to go into business together when she isn't able to find work. Also, Adam tackles the most challenging job of his life - renovating Joe and Bev's (Swoosie Kurtz) kitchen.
The King of Queens Carrie becomes suspicious when Doug’s 10th Anniversary at IPS, a date that used to coincide with the beginning of their relationship, arrives three months later than it should.
The King of Queens A new IPS employee, Jared, is so immune to Doug’s charms that he decides not to invite the Heffernans to his backyard bar-b-que.
The King of Queens Holly’s announcement that she will be moving to Manhattan with her new beau leaves Carrie dumfounded.
The King of Queens Carrie investigates Doug’s sudden interest in personal grooming, only to find out his frequent hair cuts are an excuse for close contact with a busty beautician.
Hangin' With Mr. Cooper Nicole dares Tyler to stay all night in a haunted house on Halloween.Halloween episode
Hangin' With Mr. Cooper Nicole feels guilty about lying and learns a lesson from a dream. Professional basketball player JULIUS "DR. J" ERVING guest stars as himself.
Hangin' With Mr. Cooper Mark's stubborn attempts to fix the plumbing fail miserably.
Hangin' With Mr. Cooper Mark has to go clean his grandfather's cabin, and he and Geneva realize they have different memories of the place. MARK CURRY plays a dual role as Mark and his grandfather.
Hangin' With Mr. Cooper Geneva and Vanessa move out when Mark treats them poorly, but he soon learns what it feels like.
The Parkers The Professor inherits $10 million.
The Parkers Nikki fears for the Professor’s life.
The Parkers The Professor moves in with Nikki.
The Parkers Nikki 'plots' to spend eternity with Oglevee.
I Love Lucy Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.
I Love Lucy The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.
I Love Lucy After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.
I Love Lucy The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.
I Love Lucy Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.
I Love Lucy For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.
I Love Lucy Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.
I Love Lucy The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.
I Love Lucy Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Plans go awry when the Payne men are forced to take their wives out on a date.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Everyone is excited for Malik when he finally gets a good-paying job, until they find out it's for a weed dispensary; Malik tries to educate them on all the benefits of marijuana as a medicinal drug.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Curtis gets a visit from an old friend; Calvin tries to impress a nursery school recruiter to get his unborn child enrolled.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Curtis tries to help C.J. trap his boss; Calvin and Miranda have financial problems.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne The family gets ready to have one last Sunday dinner at Curtis and Ella's.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Curtis shows Ella how much he appreciates her by re-creating their first date and planning a sweet surprise for their anniversary; Laura takes offense to Calvin's constant teasing.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Calvin's domineering side rears its ugly head when he begins coaching his son's soccer team; Miranda has everyone up in arms regarding a novel she's self-published.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Calvin battles for his life at the hospital. Ella's unwavering faith won't let the family get down.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Miranda receives a baby shower, while Curtis gets the guys together for a man shower for Calvin.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Calvin's recovery continues until the hospital threatens to discharge him; Curtis tries to mortgage his house to pay Calvin's medical bills.
Tyler Perry's House of Payne Curtis protests his retirement and the fact that C.J. will be taking over his job; Ella battles with a new pastor.
Frasier Listening to a tape of his very first radio show sends Frasier on a somewhat uncomfortable trip down Memory Lane.
Frasier The Crane household is turned upside down when Daphne's old flame comes to town.
Frasier When Roz sets Frasier up on a blind date, Bulldog winds up falling for her instead.
Frasier When Frasier is awakened night after night by a recurring dream, he becomes obsessed with analyzing the psychological meaning behind it.
Frasier After Martin befriends a reclusive writer both Frasier and Niles admire, they become obsessed with reading the author's first manuscript in decades.
Frasier While filling in for Frasier, Niles gains fame after counseling a local basketball star who's in a slump.
Frasier After Daphne gets dumped by her boyfriend, Niles decides it's time to declare his love for her.
Frasier Frasier and Lilith join forces so that their son can gain admission to the most prestigious private school in Boston.
Frasier Martin buys Frasier an expensive painting -- but Frasier doesn't have the heart to tell his father that he hates it.
The Drew Carey Show After Phil dies, Drew believes Phil had an affair with Drew's mother. Mimi collects blood donations.
The Drew Carey Show Drew's handywoman becomes lustful. A store employee discovers the secret of getting Mr. Wick to like him.
The Drew Carey Show Someone plays an embarrassing prank on Drew at a retailers' convention, but it's not who he thinks it is.
The Drew Carey Show Drew and Mimi collaborate on a scam at the bowling alley.

The Drew Carey Show Oswald and Lewis decide to sell beer over the Internet, but they must face a judge after being caught.
The Drew Carey Show Drew, Lewis, Oswald, and Kate find romance at their high school reunion. Lewis brings Bo Derek as his date.
The Drew Carey Show When Lewis impersonates Drew during a physical examination, the scheme works - until the psychological exam.
The Weird Al Show Yankovic's signature silliness warped comedy, original songs, TV and movie spoofs, offbeat animation, and ability to attract a wonderful and motley collection of special surprise guests.
Crank Yankers Sam Jay has a creative solution for her girlfriend's loud TV habits, Mike Tyson (Bobby Brown) tells a cryogenics employee his reproductive concerns, and Elmer takes issue with KFC's "hats."
Crank Yankers Annie Murphy struggles to retrieve her vehicle from a towing company, Wanda Sykes berates a driving instructor about his stance on road rage, and Adam Carolla needs to give his wife a lift.

Crank Yankers A concerned Sunday school teacher calls a bookstore to help them find salvation, Craig looks for professionals to keep him safe from his mother, and a woman wants a lesbian-friendly bird.
Beavis and Butt-Head Episode 7 includes Shopping Cart, Bride of Butt-Head, Special Delivery, and T.V. Violence.

Are We There Yet? Former child star Todd Bridges guides Lindsey on a wild odyssey to teach her the dangers of drug use. Ice Cube, Charlie Murphy and Jerry Springer also guest star.

Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor Linda doesn't react well after Will dumps her.
Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor Danny, Floyd, Sam, and Drew have been temporarily evicted; Danny asks Hattie if they can crash with her.
Tyler Perry's Love Thy Neighbor Philip moves on; Will apologizes to Linda.
Hogan's Heroes Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.
Hogan's Heroes Hogan's operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for $1,000,000 in diamonds, but can he be trusted?
Hogan's Heroes Efforts to aid a Nazi general's assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer.
Hogan's Heroes As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.
Hogan's Heroes Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt. Schultz.
Hogan's Heroes Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.
Hogan's Heroes All goes well when Hogan's gang steals Klink's code book from his safe, photographs the contents, and returns it to its proper place. But there's a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film.
Hogan's Heroes When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany, the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission.
Hogan's Heroes While trying to free the underground agent "Tiger" in Paris, Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!
America’s Funniest Home Videos A girl cracks an egg on Mom's head; a dog catches a fish; and a box car crashes into a motorcycle.
America’s Funniest Home Videos A man entertains himself belching in the bathroom; a baby spills milk on himself.
America’s Funniest Home Videos $100K Finale! Ten finalists compete; a montage of dancing animals; and a turkey chases a school bus boy.
America’s Funniest Home Videos Best Bulldogs, funny cats in sweaters, bike mishaps, "Name That Sound," and Tom plays "Head, Gut or Groin?"
America’s Funniest Home Videos Cat/dog rivalry montage, trick basketball shots, terrier cheats at exercise, and Tom plays "Big Blue Blob."
America’s Funniest Home Videos A swimmer hitting the side of a pool; a baby covering his ears when Dad sings; and a chicken playing soccer.

Ridiculousness On a special hour-long episode, the show becomes Hartdiculousness as comedy superstar Kevin Hart joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to talk about his new movie "Night School", treat their "Learning Herpes," and run from some "Big Ass Man Pigeons."
Ridiculousness Rob, Chanel and Steelo watch super-casual fight videos, celebrate some incredible apes and get acquainted with freegans who take it to the next level.

Ridiculousness Steelo, Rob and Chanel watch videos of late-night diner mayhem, extremely nasty public restrooms and true-blue drinking buddies.
Ridiculousness Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate minor celebrations, cringe at some brutal throat chops, and check out surveillance tape of rookie criminals.
Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel react to videos epic wipeouts, clever alcohol smugglers, and dogs who act like people.
Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel watch videos of suspects that aren't that easy to catch, cats that aren't that clever, and duos that aren't that dynamic.
Ridiculousness Steelo, Rob and Chanel react to fertility-wrecking crotch injuries, watch some wild and windy videos, and imagine Uber for pets.
