Farscape John Crichton faces eighty years as a statue. That is, until the Scarran Cargn decapitates the statue and drops the head into a vat of acid.
Farscape The crew bring aboard an alien tracker to remove some creatures that came aboard hidden in some cargo.
Farscape Crichton has returned to Earth. Or has he always been on Earth all this time? People from his past and present appear.
Star Trek: Enterprise A human isolationist leader threatens to destroy Starfleet Command unless all aliens leave Earth immediately.
Star Trek: Enterprise Six years in the future, an emotional Captain Archer and the crew return to Earth to face the decommission of Enterprise and signing of the Federation charter.
Classic Doctor Who Ian and Vicki are trapped by tentacled creatures on the planet Aridius.
Classic Doctor Who The Doctor and his friends have been given shelter from the Daleks by the Aridians.
Classic Doctor Who The Daleks pursue the TARDIS through time and space.
Classic Doctor Who With the Daleks in pursuit, the TARDIS lands in what appears to be a haunted house.
Classic Doctor Who The Daleks follow the TARDIS to the jungle world of Mechanus.
Classic Doctor Who The Doctor and his friends are taken prisoner by the Mechonoids.
Classic Doctor Who The TARDIS lands on the English coast in 1066.
Classic Doctor Who The Doctor is held prisoner by the Monk in the monastery.
Classic Doctor Who Steven and Vicki discover an atomic bazooka.
Classic Doctor Who Discovering the Monk's plan, the Doctor is determined to stop him meddling.
The Rifleman A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.
The Rifleman Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.
The Rifleman After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.
The Rifleman Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whiskey salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.
The Rifleman Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.
The Rifleman Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.
The Rifleman A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.
The Rifleman While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.
The Rifleman Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.
The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp A horse race between horse owner Milt Canyon and Bullhead turns violent when the Indian pony wins.
The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp Earp arrests a boy wearing a gun trying to buy alcohol who looks to be 17 and looking for trouble.
The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp Loan shark Skinner Smith is found poisoned. Everyone in town hates Smith and wanted him dead giving Earp a large number of suspects.
Death Valley Days The unexpected arrival of men from Rose's criminal past threatens her happiness.
Death Valley Days Mail carrier Silas is threatened by the Waltons, a desperate couple he encounters on the trail.
Death Valley Days Tom Horn and his gang overtake an all-female stagecoach that turns out to be future brides for men out West.
Death Valley Days Gambler Brad Forrester meets a formidable opponent in schoolteacher Ruth Stewart.
Death Valley Days A politician tries to ruin a senatorial candidate's chances by linking him with a dance hall girl.
Death Valley Days Jim Bridger returns from an Army assignment to learn his life at home has changed drastically.
Star Trek: The Original Series A strange alien substance causes the crew to act out their deepest inhibitions, while the ship plummets out of orbit.
Star Trek: The Original Series A transporter malfunction causes Captain Kirk to split into his "good" and "evil" selves, and a landing party will freeze to death if the crew is unable to find a way to merge the two Kirks back together.
Star Trek: The Original Series The Enterprise picks up a intergalactic conman, Harry Mudd, and three incredibly beautiful women who harbor a dark secret.
Star Trek: The Original Series Nurse Christine Chapel is reunited with her old fiancé on Exo III, but the scientist has plans for Captain Kirk and the Federation.
Star Trek: The Original Series A strange group of children are discovered on an Earth-like planet.
The Fugitive Kimble falls in love with a girl who happens to be a daytime parolee from a woman's prison.
The Fugitive Kimble is held as a virtual prisoner by an old man who has shunned civilization for fourteen years.
The Fugitive Richard Kimble finds himself a patient in a prison hospital. However, he is there as a hero, not as a prison inmate.
MacGyver MacGyver gets drawn in to a wacky woman's struggle to keep a vintage violin out of the hands of opportunistic criminals.
MacGyver MacGyver is called on to investigate the kidnapping of a wealthy industrialist's daughter.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross In this painting Bob Ross emphasizes a slow river winding around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross Guest Artist Dan Jester shares with us the beauty of sweet lavender clusters nestled in the heart of a snowy winter forest.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross Bob Ross spills an amazing cornucopia of red, brown, green and gold colors into this gorgeous fall mountain masterpiece - a real audience favorite.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross Find the glistening sun peeking through the trees in this wintery scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross See the amazing glacier-like peaks Bob Ross creates in this icy panorama; grab your painting knife and do this one too.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross Bob Ross paints a still lake that captures the reflection of some trees as a range of rugged mountains stand guard in the background.
The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season The soothing sounds of a cascading waterfall come to mind in this charming Bob Ross landscape.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross Powerful mountains softened with grassy meadows and little evergreens framing a nice shiny mere - this is a lovely Bob Ross masterpiece.
The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross Today Bob Ross paints a warm and elegant snow-kissed scene with a little cabin snuggled deeply into the embrace of foothills, evergreens and bushes.
Mission: Impossible Jim Phelps and his IMF team are given the assignment of breaking an underworld ring attempting to set up one of the world's largest drug manufacturing plants off the coast of Africa.
Mission: Impossible Casey poses as a young peasant girl from Europe imported to be the bride of Joe Corvin, the top man at getting underworld millions into Swiss banks.
Mission: Impossible Guest star Bradford Dillman plays Edison, a former private detective turned extortionist who is blackmailing a powerful crime chief with a roll of film linking him to murder.
Mission: Impossible Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.
Mission: Impossible Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.
Matlock (1986) Ben Matlock exposes skimming and corruption when he defends undercover narcotics officer Johnny Bauer against murder charges.
Matlock (1986) Ben Matlock inherits a major problem when he agrees to defend Cliff Lockwood, an anti-social biker with an attitude the size of downtown Detroit.
Matlock (1986) Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.
Matlock (1986) Julie March is terrified by a mysterious man following a lurid murder trial. Publicly threatened by the convicted man’s brother, Rick Biloit, Julie reluctantly accepts Ben Matlock’s offer to become his houseguest until she is out of harm’s way.
Matlock (1986) A movie star is accused of murdering another movie star.
Gunsmoke An outlaw who saved Matt Dillon's life 17 years ago takes advantage of the marshal to plot another crime. (TV-PG)
Gunsmoke Chester falls for a penniless seamstress when he sympathetically lends a helping hand to Lucy Damon and her young daughter. (TV-PG)
Gunsmoke A saloon girl withdraws into bitterness when a jealous hunter kills the man she loves. (TV-PG)
Gunsmoke A young man's seemingly harmless desire to look for a job in Dodge City results in tragedy. (TV-PG)
Gunsmoke Marshal Dillon is forced to send to prison a man he believes innocent of the crime for which he will be hanged. (TV-PG)
Barnaby Jones An insurance company hires Barnaby to investigate the theft of $500,000 worth of platinum from a jewelry company. During the robbery an employee is shot and killed by the robber, but Barnaby suspects it may be an inside job.
Hawaii Five-0 Steve suspects Dr. Danworth of illegally supplying drugs to addicts and must build a case while protecting him from a vengeful father. Addict's overdose prompts investigation.
Hawaii Five-0 Steve hunts down the Skyline Killer but is hindered by writer Norman Klane who wants to sell the killer's story for big bucks and divide the fortune with the murderer.
Hawaii Five-0 Steve McGarrett investigates the death of a young Asian girl on a flight from Bangkok to Honolulu. The girl was a heroin courier for a drug ring in Singapore. McGarrett sets out to dismantle the operation and uncover the truth behind the girl's death.
Hawaii Five-0 Steve McGarrett investigates the death of a young Asian girl on a flight from Bangkok to Honolulu. The girl was a heroin courier for a drug ring in Singapore. McGarrett sets out to dismantle the operation and uncover the truth behind the girl's death.
Perry Mason What appears to be homicide in defense of a young woman's honor proves to be an entirely different matter when Perry Mason discovers all lipstick is not kiss-proof.
Perry Mason A young woman, radiantly happy over her forthcoming marriage, and her roommate are found close to death from an overdose of sleeping pills.
Perry Mason After helping a movie studio head put up bail for a beautiful young hitchhiker arrested for vagrancy, Mason finds himself involved in a case of blackmail and homicide.
Perry Mason A homicide almost a year old, another of more recent vintage caused by arsenic poisoning, and a corpse that disappeared are all figured prominently in this case.
Perry Mason The particular way a candle has burned proves to be a key clue as Mason's client is charged with the murder of her husband.
Cariboo Trail Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.
Man of the West Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.
Chato's Land Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.
Stargate SG-1 SG-1 finds a crashed spaceship containing hundreds of people in a cryogenic sleep. Stunned by an unseen weapon, the team is struck unconscious and, upon awakening, discovers that several of the frozen personalities now inhabit Daniel's body!
Stargate SG-1 An SGC Naquadah mining operation is attacked by a native tribe of Unas. SG-1 is sent to protect the miners and discovers that the Unas are guarding land they believe is sacred. Instead of eradicating the Unas, Daniel races to negotiate with them.
Stargate SG-1 The Serakkin Warrick proposes to share his planet's technology with Earth in exchange for Carter helping him win a space race. Carter eagerly agrees and copilots the craft through a perilous obstacle course; but the race isn't without risks.
Stargate SG-1 Dr. Felger creates a computer virus meant to disable Goa'uld-controlled worlds. When the program malfunctions and spreads throughout the Stargate network, O'Neill, Teal'c and Daniel are trapped off-world, with danger looming around the corner.
Stargate SG-1 SG-1 encounters a race of women warriors whose survival depends on symbiotes harvested from Jaffa. Teal'c and SG-1 must convince the warriors' high priestess to put aside her fear of reliance on a life-saving drug before the Goa'uld destroy them.
Star Trek: Voyager A need to test herself leads Torres down a path of self-destruction.
Star Trek: Voyager The Voyager crew discovers an alien training ground for the destruction of Earth.
Star Trek: Voyager Neelix balks at telling Naomi that her mother and others have gone missing on an away mission.
Star Trek: Voyager Fifteen years after making a horrible mistake, Kim attempts to rewrite history.
Star Trek: Voyager Seven experiences the Borg version of multiple personality disorder.
Rawhide Mushy falls under the spell of a wild-eyed old prospector and goes off with him in search of the fabled lost city of Quivira.
Rawhide Bandits use information unwittingly supplied by a crippled boy to overpower Gil Favor's drovers and to steal their cattle and horses.
Rawhide The drovers aid an itinerant undertaker with a broken hearse, which he uses not for funerals, but for printing counterfeit money.
Rawhide Unaware that the man is going blind, Gil Favor asks his former trail boss, Harry Maxton, to join the drive.
Rawhide Rowdy Yates rescues a pretty saloon singer from a mob only to have her kidnapped by two of his own men.
Dynasty Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.
Dynasty Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.
Dynasty Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.
Dynasty Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.
Dynasty Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.
Murder, She Wrote Jessica helps clear her neighbor (Van Johnson), an eccentric suspected of murdering with one of his inventions.
Murder, She Wrote Murder ends a tycoon's (James Coco) plan to have Jessica design a house of horrors for one of his theme parks.
Murder, She Wrote A friend (Hurd Hatfield) asks Jessica to help two Soviet dancers defect, unaware one (George de la Pena) is a murder suspect.
Murder, She Wrote A hypnotist (Jose Ferrer) is murdered before a host of would-be witnesses who all were in a deep trance at the time.
Murder, She Wrote Jessica is asked to complete the last weeks of an expired congressman's term, and discovers politics is murder.
Little House on the Prairie Walnut Grove's citizens are delighted over a new railroad, then learn many farmers will lose their land.
Little House on the Prairie Isaiah does not find the support of his friends when he falls in love with a 19-year-old blind woman.
Little House on the Prairie A visiting young minister creates suspicion among the men of Walnut Grove when he holds secret meetings.
Little House on the Prairie Dr. Haynes takes on Jenny Wilder as his final patient when an accident leaves her partially paralyzed.
Little House on the Prairie A visit from Sarah Carter's arrogant and demanding father creates havoc with their simple family life.
Little House on the Prairie Isaiah is mistakenly identified as a member of the Younger Brothers gang when he disrupts a robbery that is taking place.
Columbo A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.
Columbo The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.
Columbo Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.
The Lone Ranger A man confesses in an effort to prevent his brother from hanging for a crime he didn't commit.
The Lone Ranger The Lone Ranger and Tonto help Rick Merrill keep a railroad franchise.
The Lone Ranger The son of an outlaw plans to kill his father.
The Lone Ranger A reporter, believing the Lone Ranger is a fraud, attempts to expose him.
The Lone Ranger Outlaws threaten a publisher's right to free speech.
The Lone Ranger A lynch mob waits for the arrival of the stage that is reputedly carrying a notorious outlaw.
The Lone Ranger A prisoner uses a secret exit old Toby built 30 years earlier.
The Lone Ranger A homesteader who has gold on his land is terrorized by land-grabbers.
The Lone Ranger A feuding rancher is blamed for his neighbor's murder.
The Lone Ranger A man who has sworn to murder the Lone Ranger enlists the aid of a teenage boy.
Star Trek: Deep Space Nine Held prisoner by a group under the leadership of rebel Jem'Hadar, Bashir and O'Brien clash over Bashir's desire to help their captors escape Dominion rule.
Star Trek: Deep Space Nine When a tragic accident causes Sisko to vanish before his son's eyes, young Jake begins a lifelong obsession to bring him back.
Star Trek: Deep Space Nine Forced to bring Dukat along on a personal mission, Kira discovers the real reason her nemesis wants to accompany her.
Star Trek: Deep Space Nine Jadzia Dax must choose between her feelings and the rules of Trill society when she is reunited with the wife of one of Dax's previous hosts.
Star Trek: Deep Space Nine A fierce battle with the Jem'Hadar leaves the Defiant trapped in a planet's volatile atmosphere.
The Wild Wild West West and Gordon try to stop a territorial governor who runs his domain with dictatorial power.
The Wild Wild West A villainous art collector masterminds a plot to turn agent James West against the Secret Service.
The Wild Wild West West and Gordon battle an assortment of characters to extradite a Bosnian Nobleman back to his homeland to face trial.
The Wild Wild West Secret agents James West and Artemus Gordon join a wagon train of entertainers in their search for a mysterious assassin.
The Wild Wild West An over-ambitious general plans to rise to the presidency of the U.S. because of his reputation as a ruthless Indian fighter.
Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda The crew is hired to rescue a princess from a notorious outlaw, but it is soon revealed that she was trying to escape murder at her father's hand.
Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda The Collectors now control the Commonwealth and put the Andromeda crew on trial.
Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda Andromeda discovers a shipment of bio-armor, with terrifying results.
Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda An experimental cloaking device drops Dylan in an alternate universe, where he learns how to save the Andromeda - assuming he can get back to his own reality.
Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda The Andromeda gets caught in a war between two ships that includes a fatal disease - one that Dylan picks up.
The Twilight Zone A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.
The Twilight Zone An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.
The Twilight Zone A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!
The Twilight Zone A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.
The Twilight Zone A playwright makes characters come to life.
The Twilight Zone A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.
The Twilight Zone A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.
The Twilight Zone Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.
The Twilight Zone Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.
Bonanza Joe has a run-in with Calamity Jane, and takes her home with him after promising her dying father to take care of her.
Bonanza Ben finds an old journal that he kept while in a wagon train travelling from St. Joseph, Missouri to Ash Hollow.
Bonanza Joe struggles to understand whether his friend was right in killing a dying man who pleaded to put out of his misery.
Bonanza Adam, Hoss, and Joe vie for the attention of a pretty young lady named Dolores. Hoss talks Joe into entering a bull fight, but it doesn't work out quite as planned.
Bonanza Adam, Hoss and Joe mistakenly believe their father was murdered. They split into 3 different directions to confront the supposed killers.
The X-Files Scully pursues a photographer.
The X-Files Cassandra Spender mysteriously reappears.
The X-Files The agents attempt to prevent an alien invasion of Earth.
The X-Files Mulder and Scully search for a sea monster.
The X-Files A woman is forced to relive the same day again and again.
Star Trek: The Next Generation Picard and Mr. Spock clash over a proposed reunification of the Romulans and the Vulcans.
Star Trek: The Next Generation Picard and Data travel to investigate an unauthorized mission undertaken by the Federation's legendary Mr. Spock.
Star Trek: The Next Generation Picard's quest to save an endangered planet leads him to violate a Prime Directive when he seeks advice from a visitor from the future.
Star Trek: The Next Generation Worf learns some painful lessons about parenting when his son Alexander arrives to join his father on the Enterprise.
Star Trek: The Next Generation A young boy who is the sole survivor of a devastated ship becomes obsessed with simulating Data.
Arrow Oliver and the team uncover HIVE's plans to take out Team Arrow once and for all. Meanwhile, Oliver feels guilty, before his wedding, that he hasn't told Felicity about his son.
Arrow Realizing he needs help battling Darhk, Oliver calls in an old friend—Vixen (MEGALYN E.K.), who summons her animal powers to get a lock on his location.
Arrow A heartbroken Cupid (Amy Gumenick) returns to Star City to destroy anyone in love, so Oliver and Felicity pose as bait on their "wedding day."
Arrow Brie Larvan aka the Bug-Eyed Bandit (Emily Kinney) breaks out of jail and sets her sights on Felicity. Oliver turns to a surprising ally to help Team Arrow save the day.
Arrow Oliver and Diggle learn that Merlyn is going to break Darhk out of prison. Meanwhile, Laurel gets a surprising offer and Felicity has a heart-to-heart talk with Curtis.
Battlestar Galactica Battlestar Pegasus deals with internal crisis and external threat.
Battlestar Galactica On Caprica, the reincarnated Number Six and the Sharon who shot Adama become heroes of the Cylon; a human-Cylon hybrid is born on Galactica.
Battlestar Galactica The discovery of a habitable planet swings the election in Baltar's favor; Starbuck's rescue mission runs into trouble.
Battlestar Galactica Laura must choose between stealing the election and allowing Baltar to win.
Battlestar Galactica Humans find various ways of living under Cylon rule on New Caprica; Adama plans a rescue mission.
Forensic Investigators Forensic Investigators hosted by Lisa McCune revisits the way in which infamous murders were performed and solved by police.
Forensic Investigators It came to be known as the 'body in the bin' case. Peter Astill had disappeared in mysterious circumstances but the reason for his murder was even more bizarre.
Forensic Investigators On 29 April 1996, Le Anh Tuan was kidnapped by three men from his Melbourne home. In broad daylight, neighbours watched as he was bundled into the boot of a car. His captors later demanded a $400,000 ransom for his safe return.
Forensic Investigators March 1995 – when a skull is found at Botany Beach the police, crime scene examiners and the forensic pathologist, among other specialists, were brought to the scene.
Deadly Women No one doubts a woman's capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal.
Degrassi: The Next Generation When Eli becomes obsessed with their relationship, Clare starts to pull away – afraid Eli’s going to do something crazy. As Eli senses Clare slip away, he’s determined to do whatever it takes not to lose another girlfriend – whatever it takes!
Degrassi: The Next Generation When Eli becomes obsessed with their relationship, Clare starts to pull away – afraid Eli’s going to do something crazy. As Eli senses Clare slip away, he’s determined to do whatever it takes not to lose another girlfriend – whatever it takes!
Degrassi: The Next Generation After really messing up at the end of the semester, Drew’s grounded for Spring Break and lonely without girlfriend Bianca. But when he begins to worry that B might be unfaithful, he sneaks out to keep tabs on her.
Degrassi: The Next Generation After really messing up at the end of the semester, Drew’s grounded for Spring Break and lonely without girlfriend Bianca. But when he begins to worry that B might be unfaithful, he sneaks out to keep tabs on her.
Degrassi: The Next Generation Degrassi’s back in session and this term high school’s more complicated than ever: Clare can’t believe Eli’s over her. She’s convinced his ‘normal’ behavior is a plot to win her back.
Degrassi: The Next Generation All Anya wants for her 18th birthday is a kiss from her favourite doctor. But when he tells her he’s off to Africa to help the poor, and she gets rejected from TU (the only school she applied to), she wants to go along. But will he share her enthusiasm?
Degrassi: The Next Generation Drew is terrified that Vince will come for him and he’s unable to function normally. He pushes away Bianca and when she tries to make it right, she only causes Drew more pain.
Degrassi: The Next Generation Dave and Adam want to co-host an in-school radio show. Dave has concerns because Adam is transgender. When Dave voices his discomfort over the airwaves, the school turns against him.
Degrassi: The Next Generation Dave and Adam want to co-host an in-school radio show. Dave has concerns because Adam is transgender. When Dave voices his discomfort over the airwaves, the school turns against him.
Midsomer Murders Someone is killing off bell ringers of the parish church in the week before a big bell-ringing competition takes place in the village of Midsomer Wellow.
Midsomer Murders Barnaby investigates the murder of a boy during a traditional annual race at an exclusive private school but is met with resentment.
Midsomer Murders An investigation of a car fire and a bludgeoning murder lead Barnaby and Troy to investigate the members of a local reading club which has an agenda that goes beyond books.
In the Heat of the Night Chief Bill Gillespie discovers that a longtime friend and sheriff of neighboring Butler County, Ed Thompson, is a racist. In good conscience, he must investigate the deaths of black prisoners as racial tensions boil over between the two counties.
In the Heat of the Night Officer Bubba Skinner is seduced by a beautiful lady who has taken residence in Sparta in order to write a novel. But when her estranged ex-husband shows up, things become much more complicated, and Bubba is faced with a life-changing decision.
In the Heat of the Night Virgil believes he acted in self-defense when he shoots a robbery suspect. But when the teenage girl's gun cannot be found, suspicions arise, even he begins to doubt his own actions. Chief Bill Gillespie does all he can to clear his detective.
In the Heat of the Night Virgil Tibbs’s niece and Bubba Skinner's nephew, teenagers from different worlds, find common ground -- and trouble -- in Sparta. Soon the two are swept up with an ex-con recently paroled from prison, and Gillespie is none too happy about it.
Walker, Texas Ranger When a judge is murdered, Walker captures the hit-man and finds out that D.L. Dade ordered the hit. Since Alex has no evidence against Dade for murder, Walker gathers evidence for Dade to get him in jail.
CSI Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.
CSI Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.
CSI Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.
CSI The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.
CSI Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.
Charmed Prue has a melody in her head and when she sees a girl humming the tune, she finds that it belongs to the ice-cream truck.
Ghost Whisperer Melinda gets a visit from a faceless ghost and is given a chilling warning.
Ghost Whisperer Melinda gives birth to a baby boy which will have far-reaching consequences.
Ghost Whisperer Melinda investigates a chain email that preys on the citizens of Grandview.
Ghost Whisperer Eli's father suffers a massive heart attack triggering a tangled reunion with Eli's mother.
The Closer Brenda bonds with a robbery suspect while transporting him.
The Closer Griffith Park is on fire and the Priority Homicide Division is brought in to investigate. When a nemesis (JASON O'MARA) of Brenda's enters the scene, things turn ugly.
The Closer A recently paroled murderer is found dead, the victim of a hit and run. Brenda must tread carefully -- the crime for which the victim was convicted was a major press event in L.A.
Rizzoli & Isles Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman who had been serving as a surrogate mother.
Rizzoli & Isles A girl is found dead during Fleet Week. Frost's dad (ERNIE HUDSON -- Oz), a Navy admiral, arrives, causing tension. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.
Beverly Hills, 90210 Valerie accepts her marketing professor's invitation to a seminar. Bruno delivers a letter from Dylan to Toni. Steve and Clare quarrel after booking a motel room. Donna resists Ray's relentless attempts at a reconciliation.
Beverly Hills, 90210 A fortune teller sets up shop at the Peach Pit for Halloween. In spite of her questionable credibility, her presence has an impact on many couples.
Beverly Hills, 90210 Dylan asks Toni to marry him. An earthquake rocks the major Los Angeles area, spooking Colin. Donna sees her mother in a photograph of the 1969 Rose Court contestants, but Felice refuses to explain herself.
Beverly Hills, 90210 The guys kidnap Dylan for his bachelor party. The girls throw a much wilder time for bride-to-be Toni.
Beverly Hills, 90210 Donna makes the Rose Court, and her mother reveals her reasons for not supporting her in the pageant.
The Inspector Lynley Mysteries Havers is held hostage and has to face her fears.
BritBox Mysteries Programming Looking for the best in British mystery? Get a clue and join these iconic investigators on the beat as they pit their wits against injustice.
BritBox Mysteries Programming Looking for the best in British mystery? Get a clue and join these iconic investigators on the beat as they pit their wits against injustice.
FBI Maggie and OA lead the search for an abducted former biological weapons chemist
FBI After a key witness and a U.S. marshal are ambushed and killed, Maggie and OA must track down a man who leaked the information that led to their murders.
FBI When an illegal arms broker turned informant is assassinated, OA assumes his identity and goes undercover to stop the sale of dangerous weapons, with help from Maggie and their former FBI instructor, Rowan Quinn.
NCIS Gibbs and DiNozzo reverse roles after a murder leads to one of Tony's old investigations being re-opened.
NCIS The death of a NCIS agent leads Gibbs and Tony into the desert to locate a woman who holds the answer to the mystery.
Blue Bloods Frank and Danny work together to help Nick Constantine (Michael Nouri), a rehabilitated ex-con who Frank put away years ago when Constantine becomes involved in the murder of an old enemy.
Blue Bloods While hunting for a robbery crew on a wild crime spree, Danny and Baez partner with Detective Jimmy Mosley (Johnathon Schaech), a detective from another precinct who broke Baez’s heart years ago.
Blue Bloods When serial killer Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi) attaches a message to his latest victim that taunts Danny, their deadly game of cat and mouse becomes personal for Danny.
Blue Bloods When a key eyewitness in a murder trial flees out of fear of retaliation, Erin and Anthony spearhead their own two-person manhunt to find him and convince him to testify.
Blue Bloods Frank, the Mayor, Erin, and the DA’s office contend with public outrage after a grand jury doesn’t indict an NYPD officer for the controversial shooting of a teenager that was caught on video.
Heartland The family helps Will Vernon round up his wild horses.
Heartland A disgruntled horse owner causes problems for Ty and Amy's business. Jack offers to teach Luke to ride a horse, and Lisa is regretting the decision to let Tim stay at Heartland.
Heartland Amy is hired to gentle one of the wild horses, but his temperament may prove impossible to work with. Meanwhile, Georgie is dragged to a university open house by Peter.
Heartland Jack is faced with painful memories from his past, and the family is at a loss for how to help him.
Heartland A dangerous windstorm wreaks havoc on Hudson.
CSI: Miami Horatio and the CSIs use radical technology to unlock the secret of a man's mind when he shows up covered in blood with no memory of where he's been.
CSI: Miami When a murder occurs during a horse race, Horatio and the CSI team discover that Ryan has a personal connection to the case.
CSI: Miami Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.
CSI: Miami The CSIs make a shocking discovery about their murder victim, while Horatio tries to save his son from Julia's erratic behavior.
CSI: Miami When a flight attendant is murdered en route, Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover all the dirty secrets of airplane travel.
CSI: NY When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.
CSI: NY The remains of a pregnant 17-year-old are found in the trunk of a crashed car, but the baby is missing. During the investigation, Danny finds out some shocking news about Lindsay.
CSI: NY The CSIs are forced to investigate two crimes at once with a mysterious energy field near The Empire State Building at the center of both.
CSI: NY The CSIs appear to have an open and shut case after a murder suspect is impaled during a police pursuit, but it turns out to only be beginning.
CSI: NY Young brides-to-be fight over a killer dress at the biggest wedding gown sale of the year and one of the shoppers winds up dead.
The Walking Dead Someone stumbles upon a brand-new society unlike anything seen before.
The Walking Dead A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.
The Walking Dead Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies; things quickly spin out of control.
The Walking Dead Rick and the others are led to a new community, where they meet the residents and their ruler; a familiar face resurfaces.
Dateline NBC A devoted mother is found shot to death in her minivan; the case stays cold until old memories resurface and new revelations come to light, dividing her Florida family.
Dateline NBC When 16-year-old Britney Ujlaky disappears, a small town in Nevada bands together to track down a potential suspect - an unknown cowboy; soon, their focus turns to someone much closer to Britney.
Dateline NBC A teenager's life is turned upside down by a shocking discovery as what seems like a fatal accident reveals itself to be something much more disturbing.
Dateline NBC While responding to a house fire in New Jersey, firefighters discover the burned remains of the homeowner in the basement; new interviews and legal developments about the latest twists and turns in the case.
Dateline NBC Recently uncovered pages from John Hinckley Jr.'s diary, which he began writing after he was arrested for trying to assassinate President Ronald Reagan; an interview with the officer who questioned Hinckley after the attempted assassination.
S.W.A.T. S.W.A.T works with Lieutenant Detective Piper Lynch to hunt down a serial killer who is using drones as bombs. Hondo's first day as Darryl's legal guardian gets complicated when his father unexpectedly moves in.
S.W.A.T. The Mayor asks Lt. Lynch to enact a departmental review of S.W.A.T. while hunting down the leader of an infamous doomsday cult. Luca asks the team to invest in his new passion: a Guatemalan food truck.
S.W.A.T. As Hicks faces an unexpected review of his team, S.W.A.T. goes undercover to investigate a gang's latest counterfeit currency scheme. As Hick's daughter asks Chris whether Street is available, Hondo must keep the peace between his divorced parents.
S.W.A.T. A drive-by shooting that put Deacon's family in danger leads S.W.A.T. to investigate a Colombian rebel leader involved in the drug trade. Tan's girlfriend inadvertently lands him in trouble at work, while Hondo's dad tries to disguise his failing health.
S.W.A.T. S.W.A.T.'s investigation into an attack on a police convoy reconnects Street with his long lost foster brother. Hondo gets some disturbing news about his father's health.
City Confidential A Texas judge who liked to throw the book at drug dealers is murdered, and the hitman suspected of doing the job is Charles Harrelson, father of actor Woody Harrelson. Narrated by Paul Winfield.
City Confidential Outspoken Joe Vogler was a hero to many Alaskans, especially in Fairbanks, where a last-outpost image still attracts fortune hunters and exiles from the "Lower 48."
City Confidential A church-going New England wife and mother of three is accused of the brutal slaying of her husband, a highly respected doctor in Maine.
Crime Stories A Nashville detective's relentless hunt for a potential serial killer, using first-hand accounts, dramatic re-enactments and exclusive footage.
Crime Stories Nikia Kilpatrick was found strangled in Jacksonville. Three more victims linked by a unique slipknot. Taxi driver Paul Durousseau was convicted of 5 murders.
Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay The killer of a corrections officer fights to be freed from 16 years of solitary confinement, and boyhood friends struggle to parent their kids from behind prison walls; but one, cut-off from visits with his son, is on a razor's edge.
Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay A celebrity rapper enters the Santa Rita jail, but his arrest leaves a heartbroken girlfriend behind; two brothers deal with gangs, drugs and parenthood and a three-time convicted murderer claims he's killed others as well.
Lockup: Oakland: Extended Stay A violent gang member asks to move back to general population, following six years in segregation; a brother and sister are charged with murdering a high school football star, two years after he was stabbed to death on an Oakland street corner.
Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay Inmates have been dreaming up new ways to smuggle in contraband since Corcoran opened its doors in 1988; whether in the form of drugs or weapons, it's always a race against time for prison officials to find the banned items before it's too late.
Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay Violence often seems inevitable in prison; whether it stems from racial tension, or a dispute between cellmates, it's the job of Corcoran's officers to prevent attacks; in doing so, however, they put their own lives on the line.
Miami Vice Undercover Tubbs falls for the widow of the drug kingpin he is investigating, unaware of her vengeful intentions.
Miami Vice Crockett defends wounded Castillo when a mobster coerces a congresswoman into implicating the lieutenant in a drug deal.
Miami Vice Crockett's (Don Johnson) scheming cousin (David Andrews) shows up in Miami with a daring new racket. Guest stars: John Santucci and Jesse Borrego.
Miami Vice An author Tubbs once sent to prison invites the detective to a party, takes him prisoner and demonstrates his views on justice.
Miami Vice Tubbs and Crockett pose as art fences to search for the main section of a 15th-century painting worth millions.
Criminal Minds The BAU revisits its origins when they look at one of Rossi and Gideon's old cases to track a killer that got away.
Criminal Minds When an Indianapolis coffee shop is blown up and a hero emerges from the wreckage, the BAU tries to protect that person and his family while searching for the UnSub before more incidents occur.
Criminal Minds Victims in California have the BAU searching for an UnSub who may have witnessed abuse as a child. Meanwhile, Kate shows parental concern when her niece, Meg, makes a date with a friend to meet a boy they met online.
Criminal Minds When two guards at a privatized maximum security prison in Texas are murdered, the BAU suspects that more than one UnSub within the prison could be at work.
Criminal Minds The BAU is called to Wisconsin in search of a serial killer, and the team looks for a connection among the victims for clues to the UnSub. Also, Kate has trouble dealing with her niece, Meg, when she begins acting out.
Touched By An Angel Monica, Tess and Andrew help a young man lost in a life or death struggle with what seems to be a case of split personality, but turns out to be something far more sinister.
Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman Dr. Mike, Sully and Brian must deal with the town’s prejudice when a black child tries to attend the all-white school.
Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman Dr. Mike’s patients begin dying mysteriously.
Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman Brian suffers a crisis of faith when the Rev. Johnson is stricken with progressive blindness at Christmas time, despite the healing efforts of Dr. Mike.
Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman When Sully opposes the building of a dam, he finds himself on the other side of the law and behind bars.
Games A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.
Gone A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.
The Green Inferno Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.
All the Queen's Men Madam and Lotus' issues reach a point of no return; El Fuego feels overwhelmed and may crack under the pressure.
Tyler Perry's Sistas Fatima confronts Zac with proof of an inappropriate interaction; Maurice must come up with bail in order to get out of jail.
Tyler Perry's Sistas Fatima's accusations push Zac over the edge; Danni settles in her decision with Preston; Andi possibly finds her way into becoming a partner.
Tyler Perry's Sistas Karen and Andi deal with a matter of betrayal that threatens the sisterhood; Fatima leaves Zac for the night to make hard decisions about what her next move should be.
Tyler Perry's Sistas Sabrina makes a surprising discovery while at Danni's apartment; Fatima puts Zac in his place as they continue to argue over harsh words.
Tyler Perry's Sistas When Danni discovers Que's true identity, she is mortified; Andi's chances of becoming a partner are hindered; Zac's unexpected visitor causes trouble for him and Fatima.
Greenleaf While engaging in a power struggle with Phil, Grace walks a tightrope, uncertain of what to do regarding her secret; Bishop discovers something about a rival, making it possible to win back Mae and the church.
Greenleaf While facing her past, Grace gives Phil the opportunity to impress key church leadership; Lady Mae steps in to do damage control in Grace's absence, and she is forced to face Mac's ghost and her own stained reputation.
Greenleaf Bob Whitmore returns to Memphis, Tenn., to remind Grace that he is the one in charge and to encourage her to consider a new idea he has for Calvary; on a mission to uncover what's been going on between Noah and Grace, Charity makes a phone call.
Greenleaf The fractures between Bishop and Lady Mae deepen and old wounds are reopened as he considers an invitation to preach elsewhere; Grace struggles to keep her secret and the church under compartmentalized control.
Greenleaf When Grace confesses to her family, not all the Greenleafs are on her side; the situation is complicated by police, lies, affairs, and the interests of Harmony and Hope.
Nash Bridges Nash gets more than just a favor from a former lover when trying to take down a criminal with stolen cruise-missile secrets.
Nash Bridges Nash and Joe are hot on the trail of a clever ring of thieves that preys on San Francisco's elite; Nash discovers the secret behind a nun's double life.
Nash Bridges A drug gang knocks over a DEA evidence warehouse and proves elusive for the members of the team; Antwon has a seizure while chasing down the leader of the gang.
Nash Bridges Nash and Joe (Don Johnson, Cheech Marin) find out that someone has been "borrowing" the name of their detective agency. Guest stars: Jenna Lewis, Joel Klug, Sean Kenniff and Gervase Peterson of "Survivor."
Nash Bridges Nash and the others uncover a deadly game wherein the players try to assassinate each other; Nash's friend Boz Bishop is framed for murder.
Nash Bridges Nash and Joe track down former SIU officer Rick Bettina, who escaped during his parole hearing to recover the money he stole.
Law & Order Probing an anti-Semitic shooting spree at a posh fund-raiser, Briscoe and Curtis unearth more-personal motives.
Law & Order A delivery man's route leads detectives to his killers; prosecutors try to strike a deal when a confession is protected in the name of religion.
Law & Order The detectives follow the trail of a stolen credit card to locate two teens they suspect may have killed their newborn baby.
Law & Order Briscoe and Curtis crack a killing ring during the investigation of a Navy officer's murder; McCoy and Ross fight for prosecution authority.
Law & Order Prosecutors question a gunman's culpability when a medical report on the victim of a drive-by shooting raises suspicions about a doctor.
Law & Order A deadly robbery leads to a suburban militia; McCoy questions his safety when he faces the group leader in court.

Live PD Presents: PD Cam Sgt. Sean "Sticks" Larkin hosts a show featuring police footage.

The First 48 An apparent suicide victim's body shows signs of a struggle; the discovery of two burned bodies leads Dallas police to a bloody motel room.
The First 48 A woman is beaten and stabbed to death in her home in an act of vengeance; a Kansas City man is unable to get out of a dangerous business.
The First 48 Detectives race to find the identity of a murder victim; a hotel's surveillance cameras may have recorded the images of killers.
The First 48 A Tulsa, Okla., man is shot and killed when a stranger sees an opportunity too good to pass up; in Atlanta, an escalating argument ends with one man dead and the other in danger.
The First 48 Detectives embark on a four-state manhunt to find the killer of a Cleveland driver; Miami police need citizens to loosen their lips and help them solve a murder.
The First 48 Two teenage boys are shot outside a nightclub in Dallas; police search for a woman who has been missing for six days.
Hart Of Dixie Lavon organizes a BlueBell talent show. But when Shelby (Laura Bell Bundy) suddenly becomes ill before her performance, it is a mystery the entire town tries to solve.
Hart Of Dixie To keep Zoe from getting stressed, Wade lies to her about how great the Rammer Jammer is doing. Lemon and Lavon try to move on with their lives, but it's easier said than done.
Hart Of Dixie Zoe and Wade learn the gender of their baby and realize that they are not ready for parenthood. Lavon must talk to his nemesis over in Fillmore, but he needs AnnaBeth's help.
Hart Of Dixie Zoe is upset after seeing Wade flirting. Wade turns to Lavon for guidance, but soon finds himself in even worse trouble. George and AnnaBeth try to make their own new adventures.
Hart Of Dixie Brick thinks Lavon and Wade are leading him to a surprise party for his birthday, but they have really invited him to go fishing. Lemon and Zoe make plans to have a girls' day.
Parking Wars Philly ticketer Shawn faces off with pizza shop employees who think they're above the law.
Graveyard Carz A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.
Graveyard Carz A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.
Graveyard Carz The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.
Graveyard Carz The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.
Storage Wars: Northern Treasures Part-time janitors Mike and Armando hope to clean up at an auction in Emery Village. Rick and Cindy don't want more newbies but Paul is always looking out to replace Bogart. Roy can't handle the tooth but Ursula's locker is totally tubular.
Storage Wars: Northern Treasures Paul and Bogart swore never to bring Bogart's sisters to another auction, which is why Roy brings them to one in Cambridge. Rick and Cindy try getting lucky with some models, while Ursula hopes magician Zack Mirza can make money materialize.
Storage Wars: Northern Treasures Roy shows his nephew what being an instigator is all about at an auction in South Etobicoke. Bogart wants a new catch-phrase. Rick's pirate shtick grates on Cindy's nerves, but that's nothing compared to what they get from director Kenny Hotz.
Extreme Salvage Squad Team Salvage heads to the Australian Outback to try and retrieve a gold processing machine that’s broken down and costing its owner a fortune in lost income.
Extreme Salvage Squad Team Salvage is on an environmental clean-up mission to remove a toxic rotting vessel that’s trapped on a beach in the Northern Territory.
The Curse of Oak Island Further excavation uncovers more evidence that the stone structure in the swamp could be a roadway, and analysis of the serpent mound has it dating back to the Templars.
A Haunting Harold and Cindy have found the perfect retreat in suburban Alaska for their family. But after their daughter begins to experiment in witchcraft, she unknowingly attracts the attention of a dark entity. Harold calls in experts to help reclaim the home.
A Haunting Romie feels drawn to the abandoned house in Tucson, Arizona, that becomes her future home. After she moves in, Romie begins to have nightmares and she sees a shadowy spirit pacing in her hallway.
A Haunting Stay-at-home-mom Jamie enjoys taking walks with her children through her historic North Carolina neighborhood, until “something” dark and sinister follows them home.
Extraterrestrials: They Are Among Us From the Canary Islands to Galicia, passing through Catalonia, in very special places such as the Cañadas del Teide or on the mountain of Montserrat, witnesses and those contacted assure that UFOs...
Extraterrestrials: They Are Among Us Beings from another dimension.
The New Detectives Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.
The New Detectives When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.
The New Detectives Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.
The New Detectives Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.
The New Detectives When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.
Unsolved Mysteries with Robert Stack This episode includes: Black and Blue & UD, Drunk Driver & UD, Yeti and Jane Doe's Ashes.
Unsolved Mysteries with Robert Stack This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.
Unsolved Mysteries with Robert Stack This episode includes: Getaway Photo & UD, Looking for Angeline & UD, UD: Nine Lives and Mom & Pop Murders (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD).
Unsolved Mysteries with Robert Stack This episode includes: Magnetic Attraction (Pts. 1 & 2 + UD), Oregon Heir, UD: The Man Who Never Was and UD: Money Clip Murder.
Unsolved Mysteries with Robert Stack This episode includes: Slain Swedes, UD: Amelia Earhart 2, Black Market Babies, Bones Knows, UD: Prison Mom and Med Scam & UD.
Forensic Files In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.
Forensic Files An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.
Forensic Files On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.
Forensic Files A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.
Forensic Files In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.
Forensic Files Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.
Forensic Files When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.
Forensic Files: Brotherhoods Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.
Forensic Files It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.
Cold Case Files Classic A 13-year-old girl's mother is murdered and 20 years later she helps bring the killer to justice, and a dogged policeman gets to the bottom of the brutal murder of a 63-year-old newspaper delivery woman.
Cold Case Files Classic A quarter of a century after the murders of two nurses, Canadian police suspect that a former Toronto cop committed the crimes. A blow to the head of a garbage collector in San Jose leaves strange markings.
Cold Case Files Classic Police must wait nearly 30 years before advances in DNA technology give them the chance to convict the killer of a young hitchhiker, and Philadelphia police wage a 16-year hunt for the man who raped and killed a 10-year-old girl.
Cold Case Files In December 1985, when human bones are discovered in the woods, it puts an end to the search for missing teen David Reed. David's skull fractures point to murder; but it will be decades before investigators can find his killer.
Cold Case Files The loving aunt of a close-knit family is stabbed to death in her home. It takes two decades for detectives to discover that a key witness was an imposter--and caused the case to go cold.
Chasing Monsters After swimming out of a dangerous current, Cyril explores the Indian Ocean with local fishermen.
Chasing Monsters After finding out their boat was stolen, Cyril and his crew trek through the dense Amazon jungle and tread through waters where piranhas, caimans, and anacondas prowl on the hunt.
Chasing Monsters Two massive prehistoric monsters are better than one, so Cyril travels to the dangerous swamps and wild coast of Louisiana to track down a pair of predators that hunt its murky waters.
Chasing Monsters An electric eel can emit a devastating, 700-volt shock to kill its prey. But is this enough to kill a human, like locals in the amazon say it is?
Mountain Men Marty ends a failed season with a blockbuster catch; Tom stands his ground against a powerful beast and in Preston's final episode, he and Eustace fight fire with fire.
Alone After only a short time in the wild, the men find that extreme isolation is beginning to take its toll.
Alone As the days pass, the remaining survivalists show signs of cracking.
Sasquatch Mountain Man Laramy takes an old pal, who owns an 1874 Sharps 45-70 buffalo gun, to hunt in the way of the Mountain Man. Sizzling elk meat is on the menu tonight!
Sasquatch Mountain Man Removed from the Rocky Mountains, Laramy travels to the mountain ranges of Northwest Alaska to hunt caribou with his .50 Cal Hawken. Learn a unique Mountan Man way to cook caribou ribs.
Sasquatch Mountain Man Laramy hunts for a spring black bear in the Rocky Mountains with his Hawken rifle. Learn some skinning techniques and uses of black bear meat, fur, and fat.
Sasquatch Mountain Man Laramy hunts the Montana mountains for what is considered to be the toughest whitetail to stalk. Mountain whitetail provides any hunter, especially one that hunts the Mountain Man way, a tremendous challenge.
Sasquatch Mountain Man Laramy has spotted some huge moose, now he just needs to hope his Hawken shoots straight and true!
Sasquatch Mountain Man Spring black bear are out and moving after a bitter cold winter. Laramy uses old Indian stalking techniques that have been handed down to him through generations of his family heritage.
Sex, Lies & Murder Thomas Lee Sehorne is murdered and the members of a local swinger's club are the suspects.
Sex, Lies & Murder An alleged escort marries her client and tries to have him killed.
Almost Unsolved A young nurse is murdered on her way to work, and though a suspect is charged and imprisoned, the entire investigation is called into question.

Dora la exploradora Dora acompaña a Botas y Tico a su primer día de clase. Ayúdalos a llegar a la escuela, y a practicar inglés y español en el camino.
Dora la exploradora Dora y Botas se preparan para el gran desfile de disfraces de Mochila. Mochila está súper emocionada porque va a cantar su canción para abrir el desfile, pero no puede dejar de estornudar.
Dora la exploradora Las botas de Botas han regresado del zapatero pero cuando se las prueba empieza a rebotar por todas partes. ¡Son otras botas! Dora y tu deben ayudarlo a encontrar sus botas en una aventura saltarina.
Dora la exploradora Dora y Botas viajan a través del tiempo a la antigua civilización Maya, para ayudar a sus amigos Hoon y Balan a ganar el Campeonato del Juego de Pelota Maya, donde deben enfrentar a un jugador tramposo llamado, Pech.
Dora la exploradora El Zorro se lleva las cosas de algunos cuentos de hadas, incluyendo los ladrillos de los tres cerditos, y Dora necesita tu ayuda para recuperarlas y devolverlas a su lugar en la tierra de los cuentos de hada.
Dora la exploradora En un truco de magia el Gran Pollo Rojo se convierte del tamaño de un conejo. Dora y Botas deben ir a Tierra Mágica con él, para encontrar la varita mágica y convertirlo en grande otra vez.
Dora la exploradora Cuando el camión de la basura se lleva a Mochila y a Mapa por accidente, rescatarlos depende de Dora, Botas y el carrito de tesoros de Benny.
Dora la exploradora Dora les cuenta a sus hermanitos bebés una historia sobre como los súper bebés ayudaron al hada de los sueños a llevarle sueños felices a todos los bebés a la hora de la siesta.
