The Private Life Of Sherlock Holmes When a beautiful woman claims that her husband has disappeared, the investigation takes Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson to Scotland, where they uncover a plot involving a clandestine society, Her Majesty's Secret Service... and the Loch Ness Monster!
Sabrina (1954) Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.
Funny Face Paris, the City of Light, shines even brighter when Audrey Hepburn and Fred Astaire team up for the only time and bring their luminous starpower to this exquisite musical featuring songs by George and Ira Gershwin.
Flight of the Intruder The target: a missile depot in Hanoi. The plane: the A-6 Intruder, a low-altitude bomber with no defensive weapons. The risk: court-martial at the hands of Commander Camparelli...if they live to return.
Saving Private Ryan A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.
Crank Today is the last day of hit man Chev Chelios' life. He has been given a poison that will kill him if he allows his heart to settle into a normal rhythm. In order to stay alive and take revenge, Chev must keep his adrenaline elevated by any way possible.
Stigmata A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.
I Know What You Did Last Summer After an accident on a winding road, four teens make the fatal mistake of dumping their victim's body into the sea. But exactly one year later, the dead man returns from his watery grave, and he's looking for more than an apology.
I Still Know What You Did Last Summer Remember Ben Willis? He's the fisherman who killed the boy who was driving the car when it went off the road in the fatal accident that killed his daughter, Sara... he's the man in the slicker with a hook in his hand... well, he's back.
Gemini Man Will Smith stars in the nonstop action thrill-ride from Academy Award®-winning director Ang Lee. Retired hitman (Smith) is forced on the run and finds himself hunted by his ultimate adversary - a younger clone of himself.
Get Rich or Die Tryin' Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.
Hustle & Flow The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old schoolfriend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.
7 Assassins When gold goes missing in ancient China, royal guards entrusted with its recovery realize they are not the only people in pursuit.
Dragon Liu Jin-xi (Donnie Yen) is a village craftsman whose quiet life is irrevocably shattered by the arrival of two notorious gangsters in the local general store.
Kill Zone An inspector and his unit are after a crime boss and are willing to capture him at all costs. The crime boss enlists his top henchmen to end their dirty schemes.
Here Comes the Boom A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches to raise money to save the school's music program.
Click When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind, or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.
The Longest Yard (2005) The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.
The Mexican A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.
Vanilla Sky Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.
Dreamland Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.
Along Came A Spider After the harrowing death of his partner, detective and best-selling author Alex Cross has retreated to the peace of retirement. But when a brilliant criminal (Michael Wincott) kidnaps a senator’s young daughter, Alex is lured back into action.
Disturbia Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.
Air Force One When Russian neo-nationalists hijack Air Force One, the world's most secure aircraft, the President is faced with the decision to give in to terrorist demands or sacrifice the country's dignity and the lives of his wife and daughter.
An Unfinished Life Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.
Flags of Our Fathers From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.
Hamburger Hill On the 11th May 1969, troops of the 101st airborne division engaged the enemy at the base of Hill 937 in the Ashau Valley. Ten days and eleven bloody assaults later, the troops who fought there called it Hamburger Hill.
Blazing Saddles Ribald, tasteless and hilarious ... this classic spoof of the Western genre by director Mel Brooks pokes fun at everyone and everything.
Young Guns In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.
Young Guns II The West has changed since The Regulators last rode through. Cornered by the ruthless cattle kings and double-crossed by corrupt government officials, Billy the Kid leads the Regulators down a treacherous trail towards Old Mexico… and destiny.
Transformers From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.
Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen The battle for Earth continues when college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers and must join in their continued battle against the Decepticons.
Transformers: Dark of the Moon A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.
The Guilt Trip "Barbra Streisand and Seth Rogen are the perfect comedy duo"* as they embark on one mother of a road trip! When Andy invites his mom on an 8-day, 3,000-mile journey across the country, the farther they go, the closer they get. *Jake Hamilton, FOX-TV
Legally Blonde Elle Woods has it all, but when her boyfriend goes to Harvard, Ellie rallies all her resources to get into Harvard Law. But law school is a far cry from the comforts of home. Elle must wage the battle of her life, for herself and for all blondes!
Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde Now a rising lawyer, Elle Woods is about to make partner at her firm, she and Emmett are still love, and her hair is still healthy. Elle heads to D.C. and take matters into her own hands.
I Think We're Alone Now The carefully crafted paradise of the last man on Earth is threatened by the arrival of a mysterious interloper.
Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.
The Mouse Trap It's Alex's 21st Birthday, but she's stuck at the amusement arcade on a late shift so her friends decide to surprise her, but a masked killer dressed as a mouse decides to play a game of his own with them which she must survive.
Hell House LLC. Five years after an unexplained malfunction causes the death of 15 tour-goers and staff on the opening night of a Halloween haunted house tour, a documentary crew travels back to the scene of the tragedy to find out what really happened.
Pet Sematary Based on the terrifying novel by Stephen King... After the Creed family moves to rural Maine, they stumble upon an ancient burial ground with sinister powers. When tragedy strikes, a perilous chain of events unleashes an unfathomable evil.
Succubus A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.
Terms of Endearment Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.
Ferris Bueller's Day Off High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.
Pretty In Pink She’s a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He’s the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it’s threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.
Evolution A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.
Daddy's Home Will Ferrell & Mark Wahlberg face off in this Dad vs Step-Dad showdown! Brad (Ferrell) wants to be the best step-dad to his new wife's kids. But when their actual father Dusty (Wahlberg) shows up, the two must go toe-to-toe in this fun family comedy.
Dinner for Schmucks There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.
Witness When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.
Safe A cage fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss comes to the rescue of a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia. He vows to help her and sets out to uncover the truth behind her connection to the gangsters.
Triple 9 When a bank-robbing crew of corrupt cops and ex-Special Forces must attempt a nearly impossible heist for a ruthless mobster, their only hope of survival is to distract the entire Atlanta police force with a “999” — cop code for “officer down.”
In & Out A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.
Fatal Attraction Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.
Shall We Dance? John Clark is a meek workaholic who feels trapped in a dull, mind-numbing existence. One night, his whole life changes after the sight of a beautiful dance instructor inspire him to break out of his mold and sign up for some fancy footwork.
Wayne's World When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.
Wayne's World 2 Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?
Election Reese Witherspoon plays Tracy Flick, a straight-A go-getter determined to be president of Carver High’s student body. Popular teacher Jim McAllister (Broderick) decides to derail Tracy’s obsessive overachieving by recruiting an opposition candidate.
North Dallas Forty In a society in which major league sporting events have replaced Sunday worship as the religion of choice, North Dallas Forty appears like a desecration at the altar.
The Big Bus A massive bus is the setting for this spoof of disaster movies starring Joseph Bologna, Stockard Channing and John Beck.
Invasion of the Body Snatchers This dazzling remake of the 1956 spine-tingler stars Donald Sutherland, Brooke Adams, Jeff Goldblum, Leonard Nimoy and Veronica Cartwright in an eerie tale of possession by "alien pods."
Total Recall It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.
The Running Man A wrongly-convicted man must try to survive a public execution gauntlet staged as a TV game show.
Terminator 2: Judgment Day The non-human machine ruling elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg assassin into the past to kill a young boy because he soon will be the resistance leader against the machines.
Catch Me If You Can From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!
War of the Worlds A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.
Eagle Eye Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.
The Conners Darlene has issues with Dan's plumbing work in her new house; Jackie tries to find a caregiver for Bev.
The King of Queens Doug and Carrie go to great lengths to find a new couple to hang out with after Deacon and Kelly start spending time with another family.
The King of Queens After ten years of marriage, Doug finds a new love - in the form of designer cologne that Carrie can't stand, but his scent-ual affair forces Carrie to demonstrate bad behaviors of her own.
The King of Queens Carrie uses her extra cash to hire a maid.
The King of Queens Doug decides to become a bartender.
The King of Queens The Heffernans work out with the Ferrignos.
The King of Queens Carrie learns the truth about a past night.
The Neighborhood After learning Dave and Gemma occasionally see a couples therapist to keep their marriage strong, Tina decides she and Calvin should do the same, to Calvin's consternation.
The Neighborhood The arrival of Wyatt (Milan Carter), an eco-conscious new neighbor, and his pet rooster disrupts the community, leading a desperate Dave and Calvin to team up on a covert mission to restore order.
King of Thieves When a vindictive bandit threatens the peace of a flourishing kingdom, the native mystical and worldly forces must come together to save the day.
Killshot A veteran assassin (Mickey Rourke) and his young partner (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) pursue a couple (Diane Lane, Thomas Jane) who stumbled upon an extortion scheme and entered the Witness Protection Program.
Man on a Ledge While trying to convince a disgraced ex-cop (Sam Worthington) to come in from a high-rise ledge, a police negotiator (Elizabeth Banks) begins to realize that the man has an ulterior motive.
Bridget Jones's Diary Single girl Bridget Jones decides to turn over a new page in her life, channeling her thoughts, opinions, and insecurities into a diary. It's instead a hilarious chronicle of her adventures in this modern-romance classic based on the bestseller.
Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason After six perfect weeks with boyfriend Mark Darcy, the mischievous Daniel Cleaver returns, claiming to be a reformed man. Can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever? A comedy that proves there's nothing like love to send you over the edge.
Bridget Jones's Baby Bridget Jones is back, this time unexpectedly expecting a baby while unsure of the identity of the dad. Oscar® winners Renée Zellweger and Colin Firth are joined by Patrick Dempsey in this next chapter of Bridget's hysterically unpredictable life.
Top Five Written, directed and starring Chris Rock, TOP FIVE tells the story of New York City comedian-turned-film star Andre Allen, whose unexpected encounter with a journalist forces him to confront the comedy career—and the past—that he’s left behind.
Harlem Nights In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.
Fences Set in the 1950s Pittsburgh, the film adaptation of August Wilson’s Pulitzer Prize-winning play takes a passionate look at former baseball player Troy Maxson as he fights to provide for those he loves in a world that threatens to push him down.
Shooter Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.
Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic. Still, things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people in this hilarious and action-packed adventure.
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem The Turtle brothers take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.
Scary Movie 3 David Zucker (AIRPLANE!) directs SCARY MOVIE 3, which piles on hysterical, yet gratuitous, cameos with thrillers, blockbusters, and pop-culture in general getting their best goosing yet.
Good Burger Kel are serving up laughs! They're the good guys in Good Burger, a zany comedy inspired by the popular Kel routine from Nickelodeon's hit series All That.
Bebe's Kids When ladies' man Robin meets the beautiful Jamika at a funeral service, he feels he must have died and gone to heaven.
Mission: Impossible II The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.
Mission: Impossible III Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.
Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.
Cheers Diane uses Sam as a case study for a paper in her Human Sexuality class, but she paints an unflattering picture of him. Meanwhile, Woody challenges Carla to a sports trivia contest, and Cliff grows a unique squash.
Cheers When Woody becomes hooked on football game betting pools, Sam steps in to make him see the error of his ways.
Cheers Sam realizes his baseball days are history when no one bids on his jersey.
Cheers Diane doesn't trust anyone when she's certain revenge is coming her way.
Cheers Diane convinces Sam to go to Frasier with fake depression symptoms so that Frasier can analyze him and get his confidence back as a psychiatrist. But Frasier comes back with a diagnosis that Sam's depressed because he's still in love with Diane.
Cheers Cliff invites Diane and Carla to the annual ball and both unexpectedly accept.
Cheers Sam flips when Frasier wants to marry the first girl he dates after Lilith.
Cheers Norm gets a tip at work that could guarantee his promotion over the competition.
Cheers Sam suffers a hernia while trying to prove that he's not getting too old.
Mystery Science Theater 3000: Attack of the Giant Leeches Hillbillies, holo-clowns, and a giant leech named Patches abound when Joel and the Bots take on this bloodsucking tale from acclaimed producer/director Roger Corman.
MST3K Shorts Advance your career by finishing this enlightening two-part short featuring timeless sales advice.
MST3K Shorts A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.
MST3K Shorts A charming rhyme for children that teaches them the alphabet, including many now politically-incorrect things, dangerous sequences, and some plagiarism.
MST3K: Atlantic Rim In part two of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 2013 originally-titled film Atlantic Rim.
MST3K: Ator, The Fighting Eagle In part six of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1982 film Ator, the Fighting Eagle.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for December '24.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for January '25.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for February '25.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for March '25.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for April '25.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for May '25.
Best Fails of the Month The best of the worst for May '26.
Fails from the Vault Tune in for animals, old folks, drones, and bad decisions. Plus a sampler of screw-ups from May 2015.
Fails from the Vault Craziest driving fails crash into the best of September 2012 in this mash-up of mess-ups.
Workaholics After a special adult video the guys order goes missing, they must embark on a quest to find the package before it's too late.
Workaholics When a social media expert comes to the office, the guys compete to hone their personal brands.
Workaholics As 420 approaches, Blake meets a woman online, but Adam and Ders are convinced that he's being catfished.
Workaholics After the guys run into a former coworker who was transferred to another branch of TelAmeriCorp, they try to get jobs there.
RENO 911! Garcia breaks up Dangle's wedding in more ways than one, and Terry the prostitute finds someone to love.
RENO 911! Tommy Hawk, bounty hunter, and reality TV star runs afoul of the Reno Sheriff's Department.
RENO 911! Reno's Mayor Hernandez asks the Sheriff's Department for help, and the deputies must decide whether to uphold the law or uphold local government.
RENO 911! The deputies raise money selling delicious Coconut Nut Clusters door-to-door.
Coneheads One look, and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of France, by way of far-off, far-out Remulak. They're Coneheads.
Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.
RiffTrax Presents: Horror Express The Deadly Mantis showed us that the life of a palaeontologist is one of intrigue, romance, and unstoppable monsters. Horror Express does nothing to dispel this notion, so that presumably means it can only be true.
RiffTrax: Bloody Pit of Horror Filmed in PSYCHOVISION, (which we hear Fellini used to shoot in), Bloody Pit of Horror is must see Italian horror at its cheesiest. Mike, Kevin and Bill brave the spider piñata and give it their bloody best.
Hot in Cleveland On a gay cruise, Victoria and Joy continue the charade that they are married, while Melanie runs into her sister and her girlfriend.
Hot in Cleveland When the dry cleaners misdeliver her favorite dress to a woman who then dies, Melanie crashes the funeral with Victoria, Joy and Elka to retrieve it undetected.
Hot in Cleveland Melanie, Victoria and Joy put their Midwestern neighbors on an L.A. weight-loss regimen, while Elka lies about her age to keep up with spontaneous thrill-seeker Roy.
The New Adventures of Old Christine Christine begins seeing a therapist (recurring guest star ERIC McCORMACK - "Will & Grace"), although it's unclear whether Christine is interested in pursuing therapy or romance.
The New Adventures of Old Christine MARION ROSS (Happy Days) guest stars as Agnes Ross, an elderly tenant who Matthew and Richard try to force out of an apartment they wish to rent.
The New Adventures of Old Christine Max (recurring guest star ERIC McCORMACK) points out to Christine her tendency to flake when things get tough, and tries to teach her how to follow through.
The New Adventures of Old Christine Richard asks Christine to set him up on a date to help him get over New Christine. Guest star (and real-life wife of series star Clark Gregg) JENNIFER GREY appears as his date.
The New Adventures of Old Christine Barb insists that Christine join her on a date with Dave (recurring guest star JAMES LESURE - For Your Love, Las Vegas), the immigration officer she has been seeing.
The New Adventures of Old Christine When Christine finds out Ritchie is the school bully, she decides to set a good example by making amends with the woman (AMY SEDARIS) she bullied as a kid.
RENO 911! When the lieutenant governor's brother goes missing, the FBI swings in to help the deputies.
RENO 911! The Reverend Gigg LeCarp, Reno's favorite televangelist, saves the deputies in their very own jail.
RENO 911! Wiegel's new boyfriend, Craig, bears an uncanny resemblance to the Truckee River Serial Killer.
South Park In a very special episode of 'South Park,' Cartman fights for Kenny's life when he speaks before Congress in favor of stem-cell research.
South Park Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bathhouses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.
South Park While the boys are waiting for the school bus, Cartman explains the odd nightmare he had the previous night involving alien visitors.
South Park Kyle's mom won't let him keep his new pet, an elephant because it's so huge. So the boys turn turn to the Dr. Mephesto to genetically engineer a smaller elephant.
South Park Grandpa's sole birthday wish is for Stan to take part in his assisted suicide. Meanwhile, Mrs. Broflovski has organized a protest against the boys' favorite TV show, "Terrance and Phillip."
South Park After being shunned by the others kids, Damien, the Son of Satan, calls upon his father to fight Jesus in the ultimate Pay-Per-View Boxing Match between good and evil.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Katt Williams, Mark Curry and Michael Blackson battle it out in games: Got Damned, On the Gang, Plead the Fifth, Wildstyle battle. Justina Valentine performs Mouth Go Crazy.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Kevin Hart, and Berner battle it out in games: Got Damned, Got Props, On the Gang, Wildstyle battle. Berner performs 20 Joints.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon and Tyga battle it out in games: Pick Up and Kill It, Plead The Fifth, Bullspittin and the Wildstyle battle. Tyga performs.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Sammie & Bobby V. of RSVP battle it out in games: Let Me Holla, Sex, Flix and Chill, R&Beef, and the Wildstyle battle. Bobby V. performs Slow Down.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Ceaser and Charmaine of Black Ink Crew battle it out in games: Now You Wild Out, Got Damned, Family Reunion, and the Wildstyle battle. Flipp Dinero performs, If I Tell You.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Pheelz, Bianca Belair & The Street Profits battle it out in games: Alphabet Train, Greenery Screenery, Eat That Ass Up, and the Wildstyle battle. Pheelz performs Finesse.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon and Travie McCoy battle it out in games: What You Call That?, On The Gang, Bless 'Em, and the Wildstyle battle. Travie McCoy performs Stop It.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Robert Williams III, and Sean Kingston battle it out in games: What You Call That?, Plead The Fifth, Remix, and the Wildstyle battle. Sean Kingston performs Ocean Drive.
Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out Nick Cannon, Amara La Negra, Bobby Lytes and Derez Deshon battle it out in games: Twerk Work, Hood Jeopardy, Pie Or Die, and the Wildstyle battle. Derez Deshon performs.
The Addams Family Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.
The Addams Family Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.
The Addams Family Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.
The Addams Family Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.
The Addams Family Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.
The Addams Family When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.
The Addams Family Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.
The Addams Family When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.
The Addams Family Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.
Tosh.0 A camel gives birth, a high school football fan goes pro, and Daniel comes up with exciting new uses for a leaf blower.
Tosh.0 Daniel Skypes with a missed connection, a balcony jumper interrupts the Prime Minister of Romania, and Brad the Actor gets a Web Redemption.
Tosh.0 A Brazilian man tries to walk off a broken leg, a woman uses her own urine as a panacea, and Daniel finds a presidential candidate he can believe in.
Tosh.0 Daniel pays it backwards and reads some never-aired Tosh.0 jokes, and the Mushroom Guy gets a Web Intervention.
Tosh.0 Daniel takes on skateboarders, revisits the best moments of Season 9, and stars in his very own Hallmark Channel Christmas movie.
Tosh.0 Daniel refuses to make a Harlem Shake video, and a ventriloquist who walked off stage gets a Web Redemption.
Tosh.0 Inappropriate Touch Tuesdays replace Casual Fridays, the Hurdle Girls prepare for the Tosh.0'Lympics Web Rematch, and Daniel spoils "Tiptoes."
Tosh.0 Daniel taps into the psyche of a death-defying urban explorer, attempts a freestyle rap, and discovers a new use for drones.
Tosh.0 A halftime performer finds herself in a tight spot, a countrified YouTuber becomes reality TV royalty, and Daniel creates a Tough Mudder-style obstacle course.
Three's Company After a happily-married computer-matched couple sells Jack on the merits of computer dating, the fun begins when Jack secretly signs up.
Three's Company Special guest host Lucille Ball recalls how the trio first met, the wild predicaments of Jack Tripper, how the trio live together platonically, and how they survive each other. Guest Star(s): Lucille Ball
Three's Company "The Best of Three's Company: Part 2." Guest Star(s): Lucille Ball
Three's Company Janet's dinner date with an important, but lecherous, man from the home office turns into a disaster when her "chaperone," Jack, gets drunk and falls asleep in her bed.
Three's Company When Terri breaks up with her ill-tempered boyfriend, he believes that Jack is the cause. Guest Star(s): Jeffrey Tambor
Three's Company Larry arranges a blind date for Jack - with a jewel thief who mistakes him for a fence.
Three's Company Janet's date, a newspaper writer, offers to do a column on the trio's methods of coping with inflation. The published article, however, insinuates that their living arrangement is more intimate than practical.
Three's Company Jack is conned into renting a small restaurant - only to discover that it's a run-down disaster. Guest Star(s): Jordan Charney
Three's Company Larry, who put the wrong date on the flyers announcing the opening of "Jack's Bistro," manages to "save" the day by inviting his Greek relatives.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him. The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. Opie Taylor runs away from Mayberry to join the Marines.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. A bet between sergeants and Sergeant Carter's lies result in Gomer dating Miss Camp Henderson and taking her to Lookout Point.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. Both Gomer and Sergeant Carter are conned by an old bum.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. Sergeant Carter takes a temporary desk job writing training manuals and considers making it permanent when he sees the platoon does fine without him; so Gomer messes things up to bring the Sergeant back.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. Sergeant Carter is in a restaurant with a girl other than his girlfriend when he foils an armed robbery. The Sergeant doesn't want his girlfriend to know he was there with another woman so he pins the credit on Gomer.
Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C. Gomer gets his first shot at the obstacle course.
Green Acres Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.
Green Acres Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.
Family Ties Alex is both amazed and furious when a critical admissions interview at Princeton University is shattered by his hysterical sister Mallory.
Family Ties Elyse is shocked by her soon-to-be-divorced mother's quick and free-spirited plunge into the singles world.
Family Ties Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.
Family Ties Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.
Family Ties Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.
Family Ties Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.
Family Ties Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.
Family Ties When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.
Family Ties Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.
Happy Days Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.
Happy Days Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.
Happy Days While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.
Happy Days The Cunningham family plans a quiet, old-fashioned family Christmas until Richie discovers Fonzie faces a lonely holiday.
Happy Days Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.
Happy Days It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."
Happy Days Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.
Laverne & Shirley Shirley makes an outrageous change after a visit to Beatnik Coffeehouse.
Laverne & Shirley Laverne and Shirley seek a time bomb in the electric company office where the girls have gone to protest against their power being cut off.
The Love Boat Bonnie Franklin appears as Capt. Stubing's infuriatingly sarcastic ex-wife with her present spouse, the captain's boss.
The Love Boat In "Oh, Dale!," John Ritter plays a rejected suitor hot on the trail of the girl he loves, who happens to be a heartless fortune-seeker named Joann (Jennifer Shaw).
The Love Boat In "Ex Plus Y," newlyweds Terri and Ron Larson (Loretta "M*A*S*H" Swit and Richard "Soap" Mulligan) are adjusting well until Terri encounters ex-husband Barney (Robert Reed) aboard ship with his lady friend.
The Love Boat In "Message for Maureen," a famous female tennis pro (Brenda Benet) confined to a wheelchair as the result of a serious accident, finds herself in a relationship with a sports writer (Bill Bixby) who was once her severest critic.
The Love Boat In "Help, Murder," Denise and Bret (Michele Lee and David Groh) are a married couple getting away from their three kids for the first time.
The Beverly Hillbillies Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.
The Beverly Hillbillies A fortune-hunting young man decides to amrry into the hillbilly family.
The Beverly Hillbillies Jane Hathaway learns her new boyfriend is a fortune-hunter who would like to marry Elly May and her family's millions.
The Beverly Hillbillies Jed Clampett is told by a representative of an oil company that the swamp behind his shack is full of oil.
The Beverly Hillbillies The Clampetts begin to settle in their new home in Beverly Hills, California.
The Beverly Hillbillies While Granny boils pool water for washing due to the "lack of a pump" and Elly May gets a feminine make-over by Miss Hathaway, cousin Pearl is back at the cabin making eyes with the visiting oil man while he gives her a ride to the nearest phone.
The Beverly Hillbillies Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.
The Beverly Hillbillies Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.
The Beverly Hillbillies Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.
The Andy Griffith Show Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.
The Andy Griffith Show Andy goes to Raleigh for a job interview and chaos prevails in Mayberry with Barney Fife as acting sheriff.
The Andy Griffith Show When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.
The Andy Griffith Show Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.
The Andy Griffith Show Andy and Helen are supposed to have a day off but are continually interrupted at their secluded picnic spot by Barney Fife asking questions about his duties.
The Andy Griffith Show Barney Fife demonstrates gypsy fortune telling to Opie and then Opie's wishes seem to begin to come true.
The Andy Griffith Show Otis slips and falls in jail and is convinced by a lawyer that he should sue the county.
The Andy Griffith Show Barney Fife decides to dabble in real estate as a side job. He tries to get the sheriff to put his house up for sale.
The Andy Griffith Show Goober dismantles a car in the sheriff's office.
Malcolm & Eddie While her apartment is being painted, Nicolette moves in with Malcolm and Eddie.
Sanford and Son After Fred decorates his living room for his future daughter-in-law Janet's bridal shower and Rollo gives Lamont a stag party, Janet's ex-husband arrives with an earth-shattering proclamation that could change the course of everyone's life.
Sanford and Son To avoid taxes, Fred becomes a clergyman of the Divine Profit Church and appoints Bubba and Woody as officers. But when the head of the Church shows up at the first service to collect his 50% of the proceeds, Fred forms yet another sect -- 'Junkism.'
Sanford and Son Fred is fearful that his days are numbered after Esther delivers a crushing blow to his head with her Bible-laden purse. He assembles all his family and friends for a reading of his newly prepared will.
Sanford and Son An innocent shopping trip turns violent when a shady salesman refuses to grant a time payment plan to anyone over 65. Incensed by the salesman's policy, Fred becomes the leader of a militant gang of oldsters in search of revenge.
Sanford and Son Fred and Lamont need a quick $4,000 to buy the Sanford Arms. Investing their last $500 in a poker game, Fred wins. He successfully parlays those winnings at the racetrack. Now he's off to Las Vegas to try and do it again. How long can his luck hold out?
Sanford and Son Fred is so certain he is a descendant of a famous person that he pays a company $25 to trace his roots. But the secret the company digs up could change the rest of his life.
The Jeffersons A listing Lionel.
The Jeffersons What's the catch?
All in the Family Archie rips up a chain letter, thinking it to be nothing more than baloney. Then a whole bunch of accidents happen. Coincidence or did Archie really set off the string of mishaps?
Mama's Family Claude comes up with a scheme, telling Vint that he could make nearly two thousand dollars by marrying a woman who needs her green card. Mama tells Vint if discovered, he could be in serious trouble and Vint decides not to do it.
Mama's Family Eunice buys a tape and begins thinking positively. She becomes very cheerful and finally gets a role in a production at the Playhouse. When the show's star, Sally, cuts her lines, Eunice and Sally fight.
Mama's Family Vint threatens to move out of the house after stealing Mama's silver and pawning it for bail money for his slacker friend Claude.
Mama's Family Buzz and Sonja think Mama's old 1940s clothes would be perfect for a school dance. When the theme of the dance is changed to punk, Mama heads to the school to get her clothes, saving the dance when the band doesn't show up.
Mama's Family Naomi's ex-husband comes to town with the goal of winning Naomi back. Vint believes Leonard has returned to make up for the bad way he treated her, and Naomi decides to tell Leonard that she won't leave with him.
Mama's Family Ellen announces that she was named Raytown's Woman of the Year. At the Banquet, Ellen is having a delightful time, until her family arrives and embarrasses her at the Country Club.
Mama's Family Naomi isn't feeling well, leading Mama to think she is pregnant. The family starts fighting because none of them want to give up their rooms for a new baby.

I Love Lucy Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.
I Love Lucy A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.
I Love Lucy Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.
I Love Lucy Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

I Love Lucy Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

I Love Lucy Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.
I Love Lucy Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

Matlock (1986) Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.
Matlock (1986) Convinced that his brother was framed for murder, a psychopath is determined to get even and holds Matlock’s associates hostage.
Gunsmoke Marshal Dillon is forced to send to prison a man he believes innocent of the crime for which he will be hanged. (TV-PG)
Gunsmoke A 17-year-old boy's premature efforts to become a man involve him in robbery and murder.

Gunsmoke A man who loses his farm to creditors finds a job in Dodge City, only to lose his heart to one of Kitty's saloon girls.
Hawaii Five-0 Steve McGarrett investigates the death of a young Asian girl on a flight from Bangkok to Honolulu. The girl was a heroin courier for a drug ring in Singapore. McGarrett sets out to dismantle the operation and uncover the truth behind the girl's death.
Hawaii Five-0 McGarrett finds himself caught in the crossfire as a faction of embattled Hawaiian natives take on the Island's underworld. The prize -- control of a labor union and the 50th state's rich tourist business.
In the Heat of the Night Raylyn Walker, a young prostitute and mother, is found murdered at a truck stop. The prime suspect is her last customer, Rocky, but he has an alibi. Tibbs is overwhelmed more by a visit with his in-laws, than by the birth of his newborn twins.
In the Heat of the Night Gillespie and Tibbs investigate an allegation that a popular school teacher has molested a student; however, it seems that the people of Sparta have already passed judgement, and details from the teacher’s past only increase their suspicions.
In the Heat of the Night A drug dealer flees the scene after he runs over a young boy. When the offender is arrested, Chief Gillespie is determined to see him stand trial, but the Feds offer him a deal that will set him free if he testifies against a powerful drug lord.
Perry Mason The particular way a candle has burned proves to be a key clue as Mason's client is charged with the murder of her husband.
Perry Mason While fishing off a foggy coast, Perry Mason hauls in what many consider to be a prize catch - a gorgeous blonde woman - but finds his holiday ruined and himself involved in a homicide investigation.
Perry Mason An attractive waitress is so frightened she runs out of a restaurant without her paycheck and a very expensive mink coat leaves Perry Mason waiting for his dinner and plunges him into a murder trial.
Perry Mason Mason is given half a thousand dollar bill as a retainer in a cloak-and-dagger case that utilizes all his investigative ability and legal skill.
Perry Mason Two exquisitely-proportioned red-haired fan dancers, a stolen saddle horse, and a set of bloodstained ostrich plumes make a strange set of features in this case.
Chato's Land Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.
The Unforgiven John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

Stargate SG-1 SG-1 encounters a race of women warriors whose survival depends on symbiotes harvested from Jaffa. Teal'c and SG-1 must convince the warriors' high priestess to put aside her fear of reliance on a life-saving drug before the Goa'uld destroy them.
Stargate SG-1 SG-1 encounters a very advanced bio-engineered warrior endowed with super strength, created by Anubis. While the team sets out to locate the origin of this new foe, Daniel travels to South America in search of a device left on Earth by the Ancients.
Stargate SG-1 Having found the location of the warrior base, Carter is assigned a recon mission to determine Anubis's plans. Meanwhile, O'Neill mounts a mission to South America to rescue Daniel who has been kidnapped by Honduran rebels demanding a ransom.
Stargate SG-1 Having sustained an injury during an alien attack, Carter awakens to find herself abandoned on the Prometheus and trapped. With only her subconscious as a guide, Carter must find a way out of the nebula before it destroys the ship and her way home.
Stargate SG-1 Jonas Quinn returns to the SGC with news that Naquadria mines of Kelowna are not native to his world and are threatening to cause an explosion in the planet's core that will leave his home world uninhabitable and millions dead.

The New Detectives When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

The New Detectives A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.
The New Detectives A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

Forensic Files They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.
Forensic Files California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.
Forensic Files In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.
Forensic Files Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.
Forensic Files By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.
Forensic Files When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

Dog the Bounty Hunter Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

Dog the Bounty Hunter Christopher is barely 21, who already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog -- the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.
Dog the Bounty Hunter Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.
